skills: Computer Science | Information Technology (IT) | Software Development | Engineering
job_description:
Responsible for designing, building, and maintaining robust data pipelines and platforms that enable reliable data flow across the organization. This role focuses on developing scalable and high-performance data solutions, optimizing data processing, and ensuring data availability for analytics and business applications. The Senior Data Engineer will leverage expertise in modern data engineering practices, cloud technologies, and big data platforms to deliver efficient, secure, and well-governed data ecosystems.

 

Data Architecture & Design:

Develop and maintain a scalable, secure, and high-performance data architecture aligned with business needs.
Ensure seamless data flow between systems, integrating structured and unstructured data sources.
Define and implement best practices for data storage, processing, and security.
Select and optimize data platforms, tools, and technologies for efficiency and cost-effectiveness.

 

Data Modeling:

Design and implement data models (dimensional, relational, Data Vault, NoSQL) to support operational and analytical use cases.
Ensure consistency, accuracy, and integrity of data models across the organization.
Continuously refine models to improve performance and adaptability to evolving business requirements.
Establish and enforce data modeling standards and governance.

 

Data Engineering and Pipeline Development:

Build, optimize, and maintain automated ETL/ELT pipelines to process large-scale data.
Troubleshoot, debug and upgrade existing ETL solutions.
Enhance data infrastructure to support efficient storage, retrieval, and transformation.
Implement automation to reduce manual processes and increase workflow efficiency.
Ensure data pipelines are robust, scalable, and support real-time and batch processing.
Identify data discrepancies and develop data metrics.

 

Innovation & Technology Adoption:

Stay up to date with the latest trends in data architecture, engineering, and analytics to identify and implement innovative solutions.
Research and integrate cutting-edge tools and platforms to enhance data management capabilities and streamline processes.
Encourage a team culture focused on continuous improvement, supporting experimentation with new technologies and methodologies.
Develop and execute a technology roadmap to ensure the team is using the best tools available to meet both current and future data needs.

 

Optimization & Performance Management:

Define and enforce data governance policies, ensuring compliance with GDPR, and other regulations.
Monitor and optimize database performance, query execution, and storage efficiency.
Manage data quality, metadata, and lineage to ensure reliability and transparency.
Implement proactive monitoring and alerting for data infrastructure health.
Monitor performance and quality control plans to identify improvements.

 

Collaboration with Cross-Functional Teams:

Work closely with data scientists, business analysts, and BI teams to understand data requirements and design solutions that enable advanced analytics, reporting, and decision-making.
Act as a bridge between business units and IT, ensuring that data architecture and engineering solutions meet both technical and business needs.
Lead efforts to optimize data workflows and processes across departments, driving efficiency and alignment in data operations.
job_requirements:
Educational Requirements: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or a related field.

Advanced degrees provide deeper technical and strategic insights, enabling the professional to drive complex data solutions and innovations at the organizational level.

Special Certification or Training Required:

Certified Data Management Professional (CDMP) – Preferred for expertise in data architecture and governance is preferred.
Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate or AWS Certified Data Engineer Associate is preferred.

Required Industry Experience:

3-7 years of experience in Data Engineering, and Data Modeling with a proven track record of leading large-scale enterprise data initiatives.
Expertise in designing, implementing, and optimizing complex data ecosystems in hybrid environments.
Strong background in data governance, security, compliance, and risk management across enterprise systems.
Hands-on experience managing data integration, migration, and transformation projects in a large-scale business setting.

 

Technological Requirements:

Deep expertise in architecting, optimizing, and managing both relational (e.g., Oracle, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB, Cassandra) databases.
Proven track record of designing and implementing scalable, enterprise-level Data Warehouse (DWH) architectures.
Expert-level proficiency in writing and tuning complex SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and triggers for high-performance data processing.
Strong analytical skills related to structured or unstructured data sets.
Advanced expertise in data modeling techniques, including Data Vault, Dimensional Modeling, and Entity-Relationship Modeling.
Extensive experience in building and maintaining robust, scalable data pipelines (ETL/ELT) using modern technologies
Expert programming skills in Python and SQL for data engineering and automation tasks, along with a strong understanding of version control (Git)
Proven expertise in architecting and managing data lakes and data warehouses for big data environments.

 

Language Requirements: Fluent in English.

job_description:
Are you a budding talent with a passion for crafting beautiful and functional mobile experiences? Do you thrive in a dynamic environment where your code directly impacts users? We are seeking an Entry Level Flutter Developer to join our innovative team in Cairo, Egypt, operating on a hybrid work model. This is an unparalleled opportunity to kickstart your career and contribute to groundbreaking projects!

Overview:

As an Entry Level Flutter Developer, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and deploying cutting-edge cross-platform mobile applications. You'll work closely with our design and backend teams to bring imaginative concepts to life, ensuring a seamless and engaging user experience. If you're eager to learn, grow, and make a tangible impact from day one, we want to hear from you!

Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain robust and high-performance mobile applications using Flutter and Dart.
Collaborate with UI/UX designers to translate wireframes and mockups into interactive application features.
Implement and consume APIs to integrate with backend services, ensuring smooth data flow.
Write clean, well-documented, and testable code, adhering to best practices in software development.
Actively participate in code reviews, contributing to a culture of continuous improvement.
Troubleshoot and debug applications to ensure optimal performance and user satisfaction.
Stay updated with the latest Flutter advancements, mobile development trends, and emerging technologies.

Skills & Technologies:

This role will challenge you to apply and grow your expertise in:

Flutter & Dart Programming Language: The core technologies you'll master.
Mobile Application Development: Building intuitive and responsive apps.
UI/UX Design Principles: Crafting visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces.
API Integration: Connecting applications to powerful backend services.
Version Control (Git): Managing code effectively within a team environment.
Computer Science & Software Development Fundamentals: Applying foundational knowledge to real-world problems.

Growth Opportunities:

We are deeply committed to your professional development. You will receive mentorship from experienced developers, access to learning resources, and opportunities to tackle increasingly complex challenges. Your career path here is dynamic, with clear avenues for advancement into more senior development roles and specialization in areas like UI/UX, backend integration, or architectural design.

Team & Culture:

Join a vibrant and supportive team where innovation is celebrated, and collaboration is key. We foster an environment of open communication, mutual respect, and a shared passion for technology. Your ideas are valued, and your contributions will be recognized. We believe in empowering our team members to achieve their full potential while maintaining a healthy work-life balance.

Impact:

Your work will directly influence the success of our mobile products, reaching a wide audience and solving real-world problems. You'll contribute to creating seamless digital experiences that delight users and drive our business forward. Be a part of something big – where your code makes a tangible difference!
job_requirements:
Academic Foundation: A solid background in Computer Science, Information Technology (IT), or a related engineering field, providing a strong understanding of software development principles.
Professional Experience: 1-3 years of hands-on experience in Software Development, with a demonstrable portfolio or project experience using Flutter and Dart for mobile application development.
Technical Prowess: Proven ability to develop, test, and debug mobile applications. Familiarity with UI/UX Design Principles and the ability to translate design specifications into functional code.
API Integration Skills: Experience with consuming RESTful APIs and integrating third-party libraries/SDKs.
Version Control: Proficient with Version Control Systems, specifically Git.
Problem-Solving Mindset: A strong analytical mind with excellent problem-solving abilities and attention to detail.
Collaborative Spirit: Eagerness to learn, adapt, and thrive in a collaborative team environment, contributing positively to group projects and discussions.
Career Level: This is an exciting opportunity for an Entry Level professional looking to grow their career in mobile development.

skills: Engineering | Information Technology (IT) | Storage | IBM AIX | IBM Storage | EMC Storage | Computer Science | Computer Engineering | IBM Site Protect | Data Backup | Disaster Recovery | System Administration | Virtualization | Problem Solving | Leadership
job_description:
Are you a hands-on storage professional with strong experience in enterprise storage and backup environments? We are looking for a highly capable Senior Storage and Backup Engineer to join our team.

This is an on-site opportunity for a technically strong engineer who can take ownership of the design, implementation, administration, optimization, and support of enterprise storage and backup solutions across customer and internal environments.

The ideal candidate will be responsible for the full technical lifecycle of storage platforms, including solution design, deployment, configuration, performance tuning, troubleshooting, backup integration, disaster recovery readiness, and operational support. This role is best suited for a senior engineer who combines deep technical knowledge with practical execution and can guide site engineers during implementation and support activities.

We are looking for a candidate with strong experience in enterprise storage technologies, with exposure to IBM environments considered a strong advantage, while experience with other leading platforms such as Huawei, Pure Storage, Dell EMC, or similar enterprise storage technologies is also highly valuable.

 
Overview

As our Senior Storage and Backup Engineer, you will play a key role in building and maintaining resilient storage and backup environments across production and disaster recovery sites. You will be responsible for ensuring that enterprise storage platforms are properly designed, deployed, integrated, optimized, and protected according to business and technical requirements.

You will also provide technical direction to engineers working on-site, review implementation activities, and contribute to building stronger internal delivery capability in storage and backup services.

 
Key Responsibilities
Design, implement, configure, and support enterprise storage and backup solutions
Take ownership of all technical activities related to storage architecture, deployment, expansion, integration, migration, optimization, and support
Manage storage provisioning, host mapping, replication, performance tuning, capacity planning, monitoring, and troubleshooting
Handle storage installation and implementation activities across customer and internal environments
Support and manage backup, restore, retention, and recovery operations
Ensure proper integration between storage and backup platforms for data protection and recovery readiness
Participate in disaster recovery planning, recovery testing, restore validation, and business continuity support
Work with enterprise infrastructure environments, including integration with business-critical systems and platforms
Review storage performance, utilization, resilience, and availability, and recommend improvements proactively
Support storage upgrades, migrations, firmware updates, and lifecycle management activities
Troubleshoot storage, backup, and infrastructure-related issues in production environments
Guide and support site engineers during implementation and operational activities
Review technical work, provide hands-on direction, and help develop a secondary backup resource within the team
Prepare and maintain technical documentation, low-level designs, implementation plans, operational procedures, and support reports
Coordinate with customers, internal teams, and vendors to ensure smooth project delivery and reliable operations
 
Technical Scope

Strong experience in several of the following areas is expected:

Enterprise storage architecture and administration
Storage solution design and implementation
Backup and recovery platforms
Storage provisioning, replication, and migration
Performance tuning and capacity planning
Disaster recovery operations and recovery validation
SAN environments, FC, iSCSI, and multipathing
Block, file, and object storage concepts
Production and DR operational support
Storage monitoring, health checks, and troubleshooting
Enterprise infrastructure integration

Experience with IBM storage environments is a strong advantage. Experience with other enterprise storage platforms such as Huawei, Pure Storage, Dell EMC, or similar technologies is also highly valued
job_requirements:
Experience
5 to 10 years of strong hands-on experience in storage and backup engineering
Proven experience in designing, implementing, and supporting enterprise storage solutions
Strong practical experience in backup, restore, recovery, and disaster recovery support
Experience with enterprise storage technologies in medium to large environments
Experience guiding field engineers or implementation engineers is a strong advantage
Technical Expertise
Strong hands-on experience with enterprise storage systems
Strong experience with backup and recovery platforms
Strong understanding of storage design, provisioning, replication, migration, monitoring, and performance optimization
Good knowledge of SAN environments, FC, iSCSI, and multipathing
Knowledge of block, file, and object storage is preferred
Good practical knowledge of enterprise infrastructure platforms and operating systems
Experience with IBM environments is a strong advantage
Experience with Huawei, Pure Storage, Dell EMC, or similar enterprise storage platforms is highly valuable
Strong troubleshooting capability across storage, backup, and related infrastructure
Good documentation and implementation discipline
Education
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, or a related technical field
 
Preferred Certifications

Relevant certifications are a strong advantage, such as:

IBM storage or infrastructure certifications
Huawei storage certifications
Pure Storage certifications
Dell EMC storage certifications
Backup and recovery certifications
Other relevant storage, backup, or enterprise infrastructure certifications

job_description:
IT Project Manager – Job Description

Role Overview

The IT Project Manager is responsible for planning, executing, and delivering technology projects such as software development, infrastructure upgrades, system integrations, or digital transformation initiatives. They bridge the gap between business needs and technical execution.

 

Key Responsibilities

1. Project Planning & Strategy

Define project scope, objectives, and technical requirements
Create detailed project plans, timelines, and milestones
Select appropriate methodologies (Agile, Scrum, Waterfall)
Identify risks related to technology, security, and dependencies

 

2. Technical Coordination

Work closely with developers, system engineers, and QA teams
Translate business requirements into technical tasks
Ensure proper system architecture and integration planning
Coordinate with DevOps for deployment and environments

 

3. Agile & Delivery Management

Lead Agile ceremonies (stand-ups, sprint planning, retrospectives)
Manage product backlog with Product Owners
Track sprint progress and remove blockers
Ensure continuous delivery and iteration

 

4. Tools & Systems Management

Use project tracking and collaboration tools such as
Jira (Agile tracking)
Confluence (documentation)
Microsoft Project (planning)
Trello (task tracking)

 

5. Stakeholder Communication

Act as the main liaison between technical teams and business stakeholders
Provide regular updates on progress, risks, and timelines
Manage expectations and handle scope changes

 

6. Risk & Issue Management

Identify technical risks (e.g., system failures, delays, integration issues)
Develop mitigation and contingency plans
Resolve blockers quickly to keep delivery on track

 

7. Budget & Resource Management

Estimate project costs (development, infrastructure, licenses)
Allocate resources efficiently across teams
Monitor expenses and optimize spending

 

8. Testing, Deployment & Delivery

Oversee QA, UAT (User Acceptance Testing), and bug tracking
Coordinate production releases and rollbacks if needed
Ensure systems meet performance, security, and reliability standards

 

9. Project Closure

Deliver final product and documentation
Conduct post-implementation reviews
Capture lessons learned and improvement areas

Strong leadership in technical environments

skills: Information Technology (IT) | Design | Computer Engineering | Computer Science | Security | Engineering | Fortinet Firewall | Firewall Administration | IPS | IPsec | SIEM | Data Security | PCI | ISO 27001 | Vulnerability Scanning | Endpoint security
job_description:
Are you a seasoned security professional ready to lead and strengthen enterprise security operations in a growing organization? We are seeking a highly capable and hands-on Senior Security Engineer / Security Team Lead to join our team in Giza, Egypt. This is an on-site opportunity for a technically strong security leader who can drive security initiatives, mentor junior engineers, and help build a more mature and effective enterprise security environment.

This role is ideal for someone who combines strong practical experience in enterprise security engineering with leadership capability, sound judgment, and the ability to work across multiple security domains. The selected candidate will play a key role in securing infrastructure, improving visibility, reducing risk, and guiding junior team members in areas such as endpoint security, pentesting support, and compliance-related activities.

Key Responsibilities
Lead, mentor, and train junior security engineers, helping build a stronger and more capable internal security team
Design, implement, manage, and improve enterprise security controls across network, endpoint, server, identity, data, and monitoring layers
Secure and support enterprise infrastructure including firewalls, routers, switches, VPNs, remote access technologies, and segmentation controls
Manage and improve technologies related to network security, endpoint and workload protection, vulnerability management, data security, identity and access control, and threat monitoring
Review and strengthen security configurations, policies, access controls, hardening baselines, and operational practices
Support vulnerability management activities including scanning, validation, prioritization, reporting, and remediation follow-up
Conduct and supervise hardening activities for servers, endpoints, and network devices in line with security best practices
Support security monitoring, SIEM use cases, SOC processes, XDR visibility, alert tuning, and incident investigation activities
Participate in incident response, root cause analysis, containment support, and post-incident improvement
Support implementation of security controls aligned with frameworks such as ISO 27001 and PCI DSS
Assist in audit readiness, evidence preparation, remediation planning, and technical control validation
Develop and maintain security documentation, implementation guides, procedures, standards, and technical reports
Collaborate with infrastructure, IT, engineering, and application teams to integrate security into daily operations and project delivery
Skills & Technologies

This role requires strong knowledge of enterprise security engineering and the ability to work across multiple layers of security architecture and operations. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in several of the following areas:

Network security and firewall administration
Endpoint and workload protection
Vulnerability management and remediation follow-up
Security hardening for servers, endpoints, and network devices
SIEM, SOC, XDR, and security monitoring concepts
Identity and access management, including MFA
Data security controls, encryption concepts, and access monitoring
Incident detection, investigation, and response support
Security policy implementation and operational best practices
Enterprise infrastructure security, including routers, switches, VPNs, and remote access controls
Compliance alignment with standards such as PCI DSS and ISO 27001

Vendor-specific experience may be considered an advantage, but the role is primarily focused on strong enterprise security knowledge, sound engineering practices, and the ability to apply security controls effectively in real-world environments.

Growth Opportunities

As a Senior Security Engineer / Security Team Lead, you will play a direct role in shaping the organization’s security posture and technical direction. This position offers the opportunity to strengthen your leadership capabilities, mentor developing engineers, improve enterprise-wide security maturity, and contribute to a growing security function with long-term impact.

Team & Culture

You will join a collaborative and technically driven environment where practical problem solving, accountability, and continuous improvement are highly valued. This role will work closely with internal teams and leadership while helping develop junior engineers and raising the overall quality of security delivery.

Impact

Your work will directly contribute to protecting critical systems, improving visibility and resilience, reducing risk, and building trust in the organization’s security capabilities. You will help establish stronger controls, guide junior team members, and create a more mature and sustainable security practice.
job_requirements:
Education
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related technical field
ITI graduate is preferred
Experience
5 to 15 years of real hands-on experience in cyber security, security engineering, infrastructure security, or enterprise security operations
Strong experience securing medium to large enterprise environments
Experience in a senior technical role with responsibility for guiding, reviewing, or mentoring junior team members
Practical experience in multiple security domains rather than narrow specialization only
Preferred Technical Background

Strong experience in several of the following:

network security
firewall administration
endpoint and workload security
vulnerability management
hardening
SIEM / SOC / XDR
IAM / MFA
data security controls
incident support
compliance support for ISO 27001 and PCI DSS
Certifications

Candidates should preferably hold at least two relevant security certifications.

Recommended certifications include:

CISSP
CISM
CEH
ISO 27001 Lead Implementer
ISO 27001 Lead Auditor
Other relevant security certifications in firewall, SIEM, cloud, or enterprise security technologies
Leadership & Soft Skills
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
Hands-on and practical technical mindset
Ability to mentor and train junior engineers
Good communication and reporting skills
Strong documentation discipline
Ability to prioritize, organize, and lead technical activities effectively

skills: Data Engineering | Python | Scala | Databricks | Snowflake | SQL | Relational Databases | Cloud Platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
job_description:
Role Summary

Take the next step in your career by joining a team where you will not just build pipelines, but design scalable data platforms. We are looking for an experienced Data Engineer who combines strong technical expertise in Python and SQL with a mindset for optimization. You will work directly with clients to build modern Data Warehouses and Lakehouses using industry-standard tools like Databricks and Azure Data Factory.

 

The Mission

To build and optimize the data backbone of our clients' businesses. Your mission goes beyond moving data; you will ensure that pipelines are resilient, scalable, and economically efficient (FinOps). You will bridge the gap between infrastructure and data, taking ownership of technical delivery and helping shape the architecture of modern data platforms.

 

The Tech Stack

Core Languages: Python or Scala (Proficient/OOP), SQL (Advanced/Analytical).
Compute & Storage: Databricks, Snowflake, BigQuery, Synapse, Redshift.
Orchestration: Azure Data Factory (ADF), Airflow, Dagster.
Transformation: dbt (Core/Cloud), Spark/PySpark (Optimization focus).
Infrastructure: Terraform (Implementation), Docker, Kubernetes (K8s).

 

Your Responsibilities

Data Platform Development: Design and implement pipelines to ingest, clean, and transform data into Data Lakes and Data Warehouses.
Performance & FinOps: Actively monitor and optimize pipelines for performance and cost. Differentiate between a working query and an efficient one.
Deployment & Configuration: Configure pipeline deployments and manage environment settings using IaC tools (Terraform) and CI/CD.
Quality Assurance: Implement data quality checks (e.g., Great Expectations, dbt tests) and ensure data integrity.
Mentorship: Communicate with stakeholders to clarify requirements and provide technical guidance/code reviews to Junior engineers.

 

What We Offer:

Long-term career stability with a competitive salary paid in USD.
Conditions for steady career development.
Development supported by dedicated mentors and a variety of programs focused on expertise and innovation.
Private medical insurance provided after successful completion of the probationary period
A well-equipped and cozy office supports comfort and productivity across all project stages.
Welcoming atmosphere and a friendly corporate culture.
job_requirements:
Your Skills

Experience: 2+ years of hands-on data engineering experience (ETL/ELT).
Data Architecture: Strong understanding of Data Warehousing concepts (Star/Snowflake Schema) and Data Lake principles (Medallion Architecture).
Key Platforms: Proven experience with Databricks (managing clusters, notebooks), Azure Data Factory (pipelines, data flows), Snowflake.
Engineering Core: Proficiency in Python (OOP, functional programming) and strong SQL skills for complex transformations.
Cloud Fluency: Practical experience with at least one major cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure) and its data services (e.g., Kinesis/Lambda, Dataflow/BigQuery, Synapse).
Infrastructure Awareness: Base understanding of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform). Ability to deploy and modify infrastructure resources independently.
Communication: Ability to communicate technical decisions directly to clients and the team.

 

Nice to Have

Advanced IaC: Experience setting up complex modules in Terraform or Pulumi.
Lakehouse Formats: Hands-on experience with Delta Lake or Apache Iceberg features (Time Travel, Schema Evolution).
NoSQL: Experience modeling data for NoSQL databases (MongoDB, DynamoDB).
Certifications: Associate-level cloud certifications (e.g., Azure Data Engineer Associate, Databricks Certified Data Engineer).

skills: Data Engineering | Python | Scala | Databricks | SQL | Dimensional Modeling | OLTP/OLAP | Cloud Platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
job_description:
Role Summary

Lead the data strategy and engineering excellence for our global clients. We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer who acts as a trusted technical advisor - someone who can design complex Lakehouse architectures, defend technical decisions before stakeholders, and drive presales activities. You will combine deep technical expertise in Python, SQL, and distributed computing with high-level architecture, ensuring our solutions are scalable, secure, and future-proof.

 

The Mission

To be the architect of value. Your mission is to design scalable, secure, and cost-effective data platforms that solve critical business problems. You will lead technical audits, define best practices for the team, and build the foundational infrastructure that enables advanced analytics and AI/GenAI capabilities for our clients.

 

The Tech Stack

Core Languages: Python or Scala (Expert/Patterns), SQL (Expert/Internals).
Compute & Storage: Databricks (Unity Catalog), Snowflake, BigQuery, Synapse.
Processing: Spark/PySpark (Deep internals, Tuning, Streaming), dbt (Enterprise patterns).
Architecture Patterns: Data Mesh, Lakehouse (Delta Lake/Iceberg), Lambda/Kappa.
Infrastructure & DevOps: Advanced Terraform/IaC, CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes.
Emerging Tech: Feature Stores, Vector Databases, MLOps basics.

 

Your Responsibilities

Architecture & Leadership: Lead the design and implementation of scalable data pipelines and Lakehouse architectures. Act as the Design Authority.
Advanced Engineering: Solve the hardest technical challenges—optimizing high-load streaming pipelines, debugging complex Spark jobs, and designing generic frameworks.
Consulting & Presales: Participate in technical assessments, audits of existing systems, and proposal estimations. Explain the ROI of technical modernization.
Performance & Security: Ensure all solutions are production-ready: secure, monitored, cost-efficient (FinOps), and documented.
Mentorship: Define coding standards, conduct code reviews, and mentor Middle/Junior engineers to foster a culture of engineering excellence.

 

What We Offer

Long-term career stability with a competitive salary paid in USD.
Conditions for steady career development.
Development supported by dedicated mentors and a variety of programs focused on expertise and innovation.
Private medical insurance provided after successful completion of the probationary period
A well-equipped and cozy office supports comfort and productivity across all project stages.
Welcoming atmosphere and a friendly corporate culture.
job_requirements:
Your Skills

Engineering Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Python (design patterns, library development) and SQL. Ability to optimize code others wrote.
Deep Platform Expertise: Mastery of Databricks (Spark memory management, partitioning strategies) or Snowflake (Warehouse tuning, RBAC, Zero-Copy Cloning). You understand how they work under the hood.
Architectural Vision: Ability to design end-to-end data solutions, select the right tools (e.g., “Why Snowflake over Redshift?”), and defend decisions to client leadership.
Cloud Mastery: Expert-level knowledge of AWS, GCP, or Azure. Deep understanding of networking (VPC, PrivateLink), security (IAM), and integration limits.
Consulting & Business: Experience participating in Presales, technical audits, or discovery phases. Translating business needs into technical specs.
AI/ML Readiness: Understanding of engineering data for Machine Learning (Feature Engineering, pipelines for LLM/RAG).

 

Nice to Have

Streaming: Deep experience with Kafka, Kinesis, or Spark Structured Streaming.
GenAI Stack: Experience with Vector Databases (Pinecone, pgvector, Weaviate) or frameworks like LangChain.
Certifications: Professional-level cloud certifications (e.g., AWS Solutions Architect Pro, Databricks Certified DE Professional).
NoSQL: Advanced modeling for DynamoDB, Cosmos DB, or MongoDB.

skills: Technical Writing | Software Engineering | Content Development | Programming (Python, JavaScript, etc.) | Machine Learning | Artificial Intelligence (AI)
job_description:
About Codecontent
‍CodeContent is a UK-based technical content company founded by Mostafa Ibrahim, a former software engineer at GoCardless and Arm. We have published 300+ technical articles across 18 clients.
We produce tutorials and deep technical blog posts for leading AI/ML platforms, YC-backed authentication companies, and major cloud infrastructure providers. Our team of 7 is made up of engineers who write, not writers who research. 
We have been operating for 3+ years.

‍About the Role
‍We are hiring a Software Engineer (Technical Content) to build and explain real software and AI systems for developer audiences. This is not a writing-only role. You will implement, run, and validate real code, then turn that work into long-form technical blogs and tutorials for our clients.
You will work across a wide range of topics: system design, LLMs, RAG pipelines, agent-based workflows, APIs, cloud infrastructure, and developer tools. 
The output is written content, but the work is engineering.Your work will be published on the engineering blogs of leading AI/ML platforms, YC-backed startups, and major cloud infrastructure providers, reaching tens of thousands of developers worldwide.

‍Responsibilities 
Write long-form technical blogs and tutorials based on provided briefsImplement, run, and validate real code as part of every article.
Research and clearly explain software engineering and AI workflows to developer audiences.

Cover topics including:
Software engineering fundamentals and system design
AI/ML concepts, LLMs, RAG systems, and agent-based workflows
APIs, cloud infrastructure, and developer tools
Revise drafts based on editorial and technical feedback
Deliver consistently and on time

‍How We Work
‍This is a full-time position (40 hours/week) and your primary professional commitment. We are a small, focused team where every person carries significant ownership.
‍
‍Compensation
EGP 30,000 – EGP 40,000 per month (based on experience)
Direct mentorship from engineers with 300+ published pieces
Fully remote
Exposure to 10+ tech stacks annually
Salary reviews every 6 months based on performance

‍Why This Role
‍This is a role for engineers who enjoy explaining how things work. 
You will spend your days building real systems and writing about them for technical audiences. No fluff, no marketing spin. 
You will gain deep experience writing production-grade technical content.
job_requirements:
Required Qualifications

‍Hands-on programming experience: you can implement and debug real code, not just describe it
Experience working as a software engineer or in an equivalent technical role
Ability to explain complex technical concepts clearly to developer audiences
Comfort working with real-world tools, libraries, APIs, and infrastructure
Strong written communication: You can write clearly, concisely, and accurately

‍Nice to Have
‍Experience with AI infrastructure, LLM tooling, or MLOps
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and their APIs
Kubernetes or distributed systems experience
Previous exposure to developer-focused SaaS products or technical documentation
A portfolio of published technical content (blogs, tutorials, docs)

job_description:
We are looking for a versatile Full-Stack Engineer to lead the development of our smart locker ecosystem. This role involves building user-facing interfaces (Mobile and Web Dashboards) and the scalable Python backend that powers them. Preference will be given to candidates with an Embedded Development background who can help bridge the gap between our cloud software and our physical hardware controllers. This is a Part-Time, Contract-to-Hire position with a clear path to a full-time leadership role.

 

Key Responsibilities

Frontend & Mobile: Build and maintain high-performance apps and web-based management dashboards, preferably using Flutter.
Backend & API: Develop and optimize server-side logic and RESTful APIs using Python.
Cloud Integration: Manage cloud services and mobile app deployment for seamless connectivity.
Embedded Integration (Preferred): Assist in developing or refining the communication logic between the cloud and our locker controllers (using C/C++ or Python).
Full-Stack Ownership: Ensure smooth integration between user interfaces, backend databases, and physical hardware.
 

What We Offer?

Path to Full-Time: Direct opportunity to transition into a permanent Lead Engineer role.
Flexibility: Results-oriented, part-time schedule.
Tech Exposure: Work on a unique product combining cloud, web, mobile, and physical IoT hardware.
job_requirements:
Software Proficiency: Proven experience in Python for backend development and Flutter (or similar frameworks) for cross-platform Web and Mobile frontend.
Embedded & IoT (Preferred): Strong background in Embedded C/C++, Linux-based systems (Ubuntu), and hardware communication protocols (UART, SPI, I2C, or MQTT).
System Architecture: Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, cloud service integration, and database management to ensure seamless data flow.
Problem Solving: Ability to navigate the full product lifecycle, from high-level UI/UX to low-level hardware constraints and debugging.
Self-Management: Highly organized and capable of working independently in a Part-Time, Contract-to-Hire capacity with a results-oriented mindset.
Communication: Fluent in translating complex technical challenges into functional solutions that bridge the gap between software and physical lockers.

skills: Information Technology (IT) | Software Development | Computer Science | Product Management | product owner | Agile | Product | product manager | Product knowledge | Product Development | Development | Engineering | Integration | Kanban | Software | Project Management | Product Ownership | Product Lifecycle Management | Market Research | Stakeholder Management | Agile Methodologies | Strategic Planning | Data Analysis | Cross-functional Collaboration | Healthcare Technology | Communication | Problem Solving
job_description:
Summary:
 

The Product Manager will be responsible for owning the product vision, strategy, and roadmap while ensuring successful execution through close collaboration with cross-functional teams. The role bridges business, technology, and customer needs, translating strategic objectives into prioritized product initiatives that deliver measurable value.

The ideal candidate has hands-on experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or Business Analyst and is comfortable operating across discovery, delivery, and optimization phases. They will work closely with stakeholders, customers, and development teams to define product direction, prioritize initiatives, and ensure timely, high-quality delivery aligned with business goals.
 

Roles & Responsibilities:

Product Strategy & Vision

Define and communicate a clear product vision aligned with business strategy and customer needs.
Own and maintain the product roadmap, ensuring alignment with organizational priorities and market demands.
Continuously evaluate product performance and identify opportunities for improvement, optimization, or innovation.
Balance short-term delivery needs with long-term product strategy.
 

Stakeholder & Customer Management

Act as the primary point of contact between business stakeholders, customers, and delivery teams.
Gather, analyze, and validate requirements from business users and stakeholders.
Understand and prioritize end-user needs, preferences, and pain points.
Ensure stakeholder expectations are aligned with product scope, timelines, and outcomes.
Conduct internal product review sessions to assess progress and manage expectations.
 

Backlog & Requirements Management

Own and continuously refine the product backlog to maximize business value.
Translate business and customer needs into clear, concise, and actionable user stories.
Break down complex requirements into manageable features and user stories.
Define, document, and validate acceptance criteria for user stories and features.
Establish and maintain business acceptance criteria in collaboration with stakeholders.
Prioritize backlog items based on business value, risk, dependencies, and strategic goals.
 

Agile Delivery & Execution

Work closely with Scrum/Kanban teams to ensure effective planning, execution, and delivery.
Participate in sprint planning, backlog grooming, reviews, and retrospectives.
Evaluate product progress at each iteration and provide insights for continuous improvement.
Provide timely and clear feedback to development teams to ensure alignment with product objectives.
Validate the Definition of Done for user stories, iterations, and releases.
Support release planning and oversee iteration and release schedules.
 

Metrics, Reporting & Continuous Improvement

Monitor delivery performance using metrics such as velocity, burndown/burnup, and throughput.
Track iteration progress and ensure transparency across teams and stakeholders.
Ensure customer feedback is captured, categorized, and translated into actionable backlog items.
Promote Agile best practices and a culture of continuous improvement and learning.
Support teams in improving processes, quality, and delivery efficiency.
job_requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (preferred).
3 to 6 years of experience as a Product Manager, Product Owner, or Business Analyst.
Strong understanding of Agile methodologies, particularly Scrum and Kanban.
Proven experience with user stories, acceptance criteria, and backlog management.
Familiarity with modern software development practices, including CI/CD, automated testing, and TDD concepts.
Solid understanding of software development lifecycles and service-oriented architectures.
Experience using metrics to drive product decisions and incremental delivery.
Knowledge of backlog tracking, velocity, burndown/burnup charts, and capacity planning.
Strong communication, stakeholder management, and decision-making skills.
Ability to take ownership, manage priorities, and deliver products within agreed timelines.

This is an exciting on-site opportunity for an experienced professional to push the boundaries of technology and build innovative solutions from concept to deployment. If you thrive in a collaborative environment and are eager to contribute to groundbreaking projects, your journey starts here!

Overview: As an Full Stack Software Developer, you will be at the heart of our product development cycle, designing, developing, and deploying robust applications. You'll work across the entire software stack, bringing creative ideas to life and ensuring seamless user experiences. This role offers the chance to grow your expertise while contributing to critical systems in the IT and Engineering sectors.
Responsibilities:
Design and develop scalable and high-performance web applications using modern full-stack technologies.
Collaborate closely with product managers, UI/UX designers, and fellow engineers to define, design, and ship new features.
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code for both front-end (Angular, JavaScript, HTML, CSS) and back-end (Node.js, database interactions).

Experience with Node.js for backend development, proficiency in designing and implementing RESTful APIs, and strong command of SQL for database management are crucial. A solid foundation in Computer Science principles, Software Development methodologies, and version control with Git is essential. Your adept Problem-Solving skills will be key to success.
Growth Opportunities: We are committed to your professional development. You'll have access to continuous learning resources, mentorship from senior engineers, and clear pathways for career advancement within our growing organization. We encourage innovation and provide opportunities to explore new technologies and take on leadership roles.
Team & Culture: Join a vibrant and supportive team that values open communication, collaboration, and a passion for technology. We foster an environment where ideas are welcomed, challenges are met with collective effort, and success is celebrated together. Our on-site setting in Sharqia, Egypt, promotes strong teamwork and a shared sense of purpose.
Impact: Your work will directly shape the future of our products, delivering cutting-edge solutions that empower our users and drive business success. You'll contribute to projects that span diverse engineering and IT domains, making a tangible difference in the technological landscape.

job_categories: IT/Software Development | Engineering - Telecom/Technology | Engineering - Mechanical/Electrical
skills: AI | Computer Science | Engineering | Information Technology (IT) | Software Development
job_description:
About the Role

We are seeking an engineer who doesn't just "talk" to LLMs but builds autonomous, resilient systems. You will design multi-agent architecture that can reason, use tools, and recover from failures independently.
 

Your primary goal is to bridge the gap between "cool demos" and "production-grade reliability." You will be responsible for deploying agents across various business sectors (e.g., Finance, Operations, Customer Success), ensuring they are not only intelligent but also safe, cost-effective, and predictable in a production environment.
 

Key Responsibilities
 

●  Agent Orchestration: Design and implement stateful, multi-turn agent workflows using frameworks like LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, PydanticAI, Swarm, Haystack, or Bee Agent Framework.
 

● Proactive Reliability & Guardrails: Architect systems that prevent production meltdowns. Implement circuit breakers, "human-in-the-loop" triggers, and input/output guardrails to stop infinite loops, prompt injections, and hallucinated tool calls before they reach the end user.
 

● Multi-Sector Tooling: Build and maintain high-precision API integrations (tools) that allow agents to interact with diverse business systems (ERPs, CRMs, custom databases) deterministically.
 

● Observability & Tracing: Set up advanced tracing (e.g., LangSmith, Langfuse, or Arize Phoenix) to debug complex reasoning chains and monitor agent trajectories in real-time.
 

● Rigorous Evaluation (Evals): Develop automated "Golden Datasets" and evaluation frameworks (using RAGas, DeepEval, G-Eval, LangSmith Evaluators, or custom model-based grading) to measure agent success rates and prevent regressions before every deployment.
 

● Cost & Latency Optimization: Manage the "token budget" by implementing tiered model routing (e.g., using Gemini 3 Flash for initial reasoning and Ultra for final verification) and optimizing context window usage.
job_requirements:
Required Qualifications
 

●  3+ years of Software Engineering experience, with a background in Python and FastAPI (or similar).
 

● 1+ year of experience specifically focused on LLM-based Agents in a production environment.
 

● Deep Expertise in Agentic Patterns: Proven experience implementing ReAct, Plan-and-Execute, or Multi-Agent Supervisor architectures.
 

● Production Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with modern Vector Databases and Search Engines (e.g., Pinecone, Milvus, Weaviate, Qdrant, Chroma, or pgvector) and semantic caching strategies.
 

● Robustness Mindset: A track record of handling non-deterministic failures (e.g., implementing custom retry logic and fallback strategies for failed tool calls).
 

Preferred Qualifications (The "Plus" Factors)
 

● Experience with Fine-tuning smaller models (e.g., Llama 3) for specific tool-calling tasks to reduce latency.
 

● Knowledge of Data Privacy (handling PII in agent prompts) and AI Security best practices.
 

● Prior experience building agents for specialized sectors like Fintech or Supply Chain.

skills: Computer Science | Odoo | Python | Information Technology (IT) | API | Odoo Development | ORM | PostgreSQL | XML
job_description:
Senior Odoo Developer — Integrations & Financial Reporting
About the Project

We are a digital agency (Anecdote) with our in-house development team, running Odoo as the operational hub for project management, campaign workflows, and finance. We maintain custom modules that link external advertising and analytics platforms to Odoo — automating budget tracking, media planning, and performance reporting — and extend Odoo's accounting layer for localised financial statements, asset management, and bank reconciliation. The stack is cloud-hosted in a containerised deployment with CI/CD automation.

 
What You'll Work On

 

Third-party integrations: Maintain and extend connections to advertising and analytics platforms via REST/JSON APIs and their SDKs — handling data sync, TTL-based caching, and robust error handling.
Campaign & project workflows: Build and evolve wizards and automation that translate campaign planning data into structured Odoo work items (tasks, budgets, timelines) and generate QWeb reports with KPI summaries.
Budget & time tracking: Develop models and logic for rolling budget computation, variable service pricing, and time allocation across hierarchical task structures.
Accounting & financial reporting: Extend core Odoo accounting with additional reports (PDF and Excel), financial statements, asset tracking flows, and reconciliation support.
Custom views & OWL components: Create and maintain Kanban/List view extensions, field widgets, and OWL components — including custom styling where needed.
Platform & CI/CD: Work within a Docker-based local dev environment and a CI pipeline that builds, tests, and deploys to a container registry on merge.
Test coverage: Champion automated testing — writing model-level and integration tests to establish a growing safety net across the codebase.

 

Tech Stack

 

ERP: Odoo
Backend: Python, Odoo ORM
Frontend: OWL (Odoo Web Library), JavaScript, SCSS
External APIs: Advertising/marketing platform APIs
Database: PostgreSQL
Reporting: QWeb (PDF), openpyxl (Excel)
Containerisation: Docker, Docker Compose
CI/CD: Bitbucket Pipelines, container registry
 
How We Work

 

Module-first architecture: every feature lives in its own addon with clean __manifest__.py dependency declarations — new work follows the same pattern.
Small, focused team: compact dev team where each engineer owns full vertical slices (model → view → report → deployment).
Docker-native workflow: local dev runs entirely in containers via Docker Compose; there is no bare-metal Odoo setup.
CI on merge: builds are image-cached to keep pipeline times short; deployments are triggered automatically on merge.
Growing test culture: we want someone who will help establish and expand automated test coverage — this is an active priority, not an afterthought.
Code style: consistent use of Odoo decorator patterns and access-control matrices.
job_requirements:
Must-Have Qualifications

 

3+ years of Odoo development.
Python ORM mastery: computed/related fields with @api.depends, @api.[removed], @api.constrains, _sql_constraints, and CRUD overrides (create, write, unlink).
Model inheritance patterns: _inherit (extension), abstract mixins, and TransientModel wizards.
Security model: authoring ir.model.access.csv, record rules (ir.rule), group-based permissions, and knowing when (and when not) to use sudo().
QWeb reports: designing and debugging XML report templates that produce both PDF and structured data output.
External API integration: consuming REST/JSON APIs from Python with proper error handling; hands-on experience with at least one third-party SDK.
Odoo JS ecosystem: custom OWL components, extending standard Kanban/List controllers, understanding the asset bundle pipeline.
Docker: comfortable writing and debugging docker-compose.yml files; able to trace build failures through multi-stage Dockerfile logic.
 
Nice-to-Have

 

Major ad platform APIs (e.g. Meta, Tiktok, Snapchat) — existing familiarity with advertising platform APIs shortens onboarding significantly.
Accounting domain knowledge — understanding of double-entry bookkeeping, asset depreciation schedules, and bank reconciliation flows.
AWS & Bitbucket Pipelines — experience with cloud container registries and pipeline YAML configuration is a plus.
openpyxl / xlsxwriter — used for Excel report exports; ability to produce formatted multi-sheet workbooks.
Bank statement parsing — familiarity with OFX/QIF formats or relevant parsing libraries.
PostgreSQL performance tuning — the reporting layer will benefit from query-level optimisation as data grows.
pytest-odoo or Odoo test runner — experience writing TransactionCase and HttpCase tests; bootstrapping a test suite from scratch is highly valued.

job_description:
AI-Native Full-Stack Developer (Corporate Innovation Role)
Headline: [REMOTE] AI-Native Developer – Corporate Innovation Role –
Target Profile: Talented young developers in Egypt with an elite corporate mindset and exceptional English.
Timezone Requirement: Minimum 10 hours of "Desk Time" per week, overlapping with AST (Atlantic Standard Time) for strategic coordination with Trinidad & Tobago-based leadership.

The Opportunity

We are seeking a high-caliber, young developer to join our team as a core technical engine. This is a long-term professional role focused on building limited-deployment agentic business systems for very niche micro-markets.
You will work under the supervision of our Technical Lead to develop, deploy, and maintain a suite of agentic deployments, full-stack Micro-SaaS products, and internal projects.
The Profile: "AI-Native Professional"
We are looking for a developer who is aligned with operating as part of a high-performance, English-speaking corporate team. You should be someone who doesn't just "write code," but understands how to use AI to solve complex business problems at 10x speed.

Responsibilities

Deployment & Maintenance: Orchestrate and manage autonomous AI agents for internal operations and external client-facing stacks.
High-Leverage Execution: Build out architectures supporting operations in Insurance, Law, Fiduciary work, and Auditing.
Collaboration: Participate in 10 hours of weekly "Desk Time" for sprint planning, live debugging, and coordination.

The Deal

Starting Salary: $500 - 650 USD per month (Contractual).
Performance Culture: We offer a high-trust environment. Delivery of agreed outcomes is the key consideration.
Payment Security: Monthly salary is lodged in advance via Escrow and released upon achievement of monthly milestones and verified performance.

How to Apply

We value transparency and demonstration of skill over traditional CVs.

Your application MUST include:

Portfolio Pieces: Links to your GitHub repositories or live projects.
Project Descriptions (Video Preferred): A Loom video (or similar screen recording) walking us through a specific project you built.
Explain the problem, the tech stack, and specifically how you utilized AI Agents to accelerate the development process.
Statement of Intent: A brief explanation of why you are interested in building niche agentic systems for the Caribbean market.

Deadline for application is Wednesday 25th March 2026
job_requirements:
Exceptional English: Outstanding spoken and written English is mandatory. You must be able to document work clearly and communicate complex technical concepts in a corporate setting.
Corporate Mindset: You are disciplined, self-directed, and understand the importance of reliability, reporting, and consistent "Desk Time" presence.
AI-First Workflow: Expert-level orchestration of AI agents (Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, etc.). We value the result over the manual hours spent.
Technical Breadth: Proficiency in modern stacks (React/Next.js, Python, Supabase) and a deep interest in Agentic AI and ERP implementations.

job_description:
Unleash Your Oracle Prowess: Join Our Dynamic Team as an Oracle E-Business Suite Developer!

Are you a skilled Oracle developer with a passion for transforming business processes through robust ERP solutions? We are searching for an exceptional Oracle E-Business Suite Developer and Apex Development  to join our innovative IT/Software Development team in the vibrant city of Alexandria, Egypt. This is an incredible on-site opportunity for an experienced professional to dive deep into complex systems, , and make a tangible impact on our operations.

What You'll Be Doing: Your Impactful Responsibilities
Develop and Maintain: Design, develop, and maintain custom applications, extensions, interfaces, and reports within the Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) environment using PL/SQL, Oracle Forms, Oracle Reports, and BI Publisher.
Data Mastery: Lead and execute critical Data Migration projects, ensuring data integrity and seamless transitions.
Seamless Integration: Architect and implement robust System Integration solutions between EBS and other enterprise applications.
Troubleshooting & Optimization: Diagnose, resolve, and optimize complex technical issues, ensuring the highest level of system performance and stability.
Collaborate & Innovate: Work closely with functional teams to gather requirements, design solutions, and provide expert technical consultation.
Document Excellence: Create comprehensive Technical Documentation for designs, configurations, and support procedures.
Continuous Improvement: Contribute to the ongoing enhancement and evolution of our ERP landscape.
Skills & Technologies You'll Master

You'll be working hands-on with the core technologies that power our business, including Oracle E-Business Suite, Oracle SQL, PL/SQL, Oracle Forms, Oracle Reports, BI Publisher, and various ERP Systems. Your expertise will be crucial in areas like Data Migration, System Integration, Database Management, and Performance Tuning.

Growth Opportunities & Beyond

We are committed to your professional development. This role offers ample opportunities to expand your knowledge across different EBS modules, delve into advanced database administration, and potentially grow into lead or architect roles. We encourage continuous learning and provide resources to keep you at the forefront of Oracle technologies.

Our Collaborative Team & Culture

Join a culture that thrives on collaboration, innovation, and mutual support. We believe in empowering our team members, fostering an environment where ideas are shared, and everyone's contribution is valued. You'll be part of a passionate group dedicated to delivering high-quality solutions and achieving collective success.

Your Impact Here

skills: Health, Safety & Environment (HSE) Management | Risk Assessment | Incident Investigation | Regulatory Compliance | Safety Auditing | Training & Development | Emergency Response Planning | Environmental Monitoring | Report Writing | Team Collaboration
job_description:
1) Compliance & Governance

Ensure adherence to Egyptian laws and regulations (e.g., environmental permits, hazardous substances, civil defense/fire codes, labor law) and local authority/site licensing requirements.
Maintain and improve ISO 45001 (OHSMS) and ISO 14001 (EMS) management systems; lead internal audits, corrective actions, and surveillance/recertification preparations.
Develop, review, and roll out HSE policies, procedures, SOPs, and permit‑to‑work systems across all retail sites.

2) Risk Management & Process Safety (Retail Focus)

Conduct and update risk assessments (HIRA/JSA), bow‑ties, and job safety analyses for fueling, tanker offloading, tank gauging, confined space entry, hot works, and working at height.
Lead process safety controls for storage tanks, piping, dispensers, vapor recovery, pressure relief, and electrical bonding/earthing; verify integrity through inspections and testing.
Implement and monitor contractor HSE requirements (pre‑qualification, onboarding, method statements, tool‑box talks, supervision).

3) Site Assurance & Inspections

Plan and perform station audits/inspections (housekeeping, ATEX/EX equipment, emergency equipment, signage, spill kits, firefighting systems, separators).
Track actions to closure; report trends and recommend engineering and behavioral controls.
Verify tanker fleet compliance (ADR-equivalent practices, driver competence, defensive driving, spill prevention).

4) Incident Prevention, Reporting & Learning

Lead incident/near‑miss investigations using root cause techniques (5‑Why, ICAM, TapRooT® style), issue reports, and drive corrective/preventive actions.
Champion HSE reporting pyramid/iceberg concepts to boost near‑miss, hazard observation, and unsafe condition reporting and learning (REX).
Manage statutory emergency response arrangements, drills, and coordination with local authorities and Civil Defense.

5) Training, Culture & Engagement

Deliver and track HSE training (induction, PTW, LOTO, confined space, working at height, spill response, fire warden, manual handling).
Coach site managers/dealers and supervisors on behavior-based safety, leadership walkdowns, and toolbox talks.
Lead campaigns (heat stress, driving safety, slips/trips/falls) and Safety Days.

6) Environment & Sustainability

Oversee spill prevention and response, waste management, water/oil separator maintenance, and air emissions (vapor recovery).
Monitor utilities, fuel losses, and product variance; support leak detection, tank tightness testing, and remediation.

We are a US-based, successful e-commerce and EdTech company. We are looking for a sharp, AI-native graduate who thinks in systems and solves problems with automation. This is not a traditional software engineering role — you won't spend your days writing code. Instead, you will use cutting-edge AI tools, particularly Claude Code, to design, build, and manage intelligent systems that automate our core business processes across technology, marketing, and operations.

 

This is a rare opportunity to join at the forefront of an AI-driven transformation. If you are someone who naturally asks 'how can AI do this better?' — this role was built for you.

AI Systems & Automation

Understand and interpret PHP code well enough to identify issues, request AI-generated fixes, and validate solutions without necessarily coding from scratch.

Systems Thinking & Continuous Improvement

Are you an experienced Engineer with a passion for cutting-edge safety and security systems? This is an unparalleled opportunity to build, maintain, and optimize essential systems, ensuring robust performance and security.

Overview: As an Integrated Systems Engineer, you will be at the forefront of deploying and maintaining crucial safety and security technologies. Your role is pivotal in protecting assets and people through expert installation and meticulous maintenance of complex integrated systems.
Responsibilities:
Install, configure, and commission a wide array of integrated systems including Fire Alarm Systems, Fire Fighting Systems, Intrusion Detection Systems, Access Control Systems, and CCTV Systems.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate new technologies and improve existing system architectures.
Document all installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting activities accurately and comprehensively.
Skills/Technologies: This role demands a strong foundation in Information Technology and Engineering, coupled with hands-on expertise in the specified safety and security systems. Your ability to apply Software Development Fundamentals to system integration and troubleshooting will be a significant asset.
Growth Opportunities: We are committed to your professional development! You'll gain exposure to diverse technologies and complex projects, with clear pathways for advancing into senior engineering or specialized technical roles. Continuous learning and skill enhancement are integral to our culture.
Team/Culture: Join a collaborative and supportive team that values innovation, precision, and problem-solving. We foster an environment where your contributions are recognized, and your growth is encouraged, all within a flexible hybrid work model.
Impact: Your work will directly contribute to the safety, security, and operational efficiency of vital facilities. You will play a crucial role in implementing and maintaining systems that protect lives and property, making a tangible difference every day.

skills: Project Management | SAP | SAP Implementation | Project | Communication | Computer Science | Construction | Engineering | Information Technology (IT) | Management | Projects
job_description:
We are looking for a dedicated SAP Implementation Manager to take full ownership of our SAP ecosystem. This is a practical, execution-heavy role. You will be responsible for the day-to-day management of SAP module rollouts, system enhancements, and stabilizing the platform for our office and site-based teams.
You aren't just managing a timeline; you are ensuring that our SAP environment actually works for a large-scale construction operation. You will be the point person for translating our construction workflows into SAP configurations and ensuring that the system is fully adopted by the workforce.
Module Rollout & Optimization: Lead the daily activities for implementing or upgrading specific SAP modules (e.g., S/4HANA, FICO, MM, or PS).
Vendor & Consultant Oversight: Manage the daily deliverables of external SAP consultants to ensure they meet our technical requirements on time.
Operational Troubleshooting: Act as the first line of defense for SAP "bottlenecks," working to fix data flow or process issues immediately.
User Training & Support: Coordinate hands-on training sessions for site engineers and accountants to ensure they use SAP correctly.
UAT Management: Lead the User Acceptance Testing (UAT) phase for every new feature, ensuring it is "field-ready" before going live.
job_requirements:
SAP Expertise: At least 8 years of experience in SAP implementation, with a deep understanding of core modules relevant to construction (MM, FI, or Project Systems).
Construction Industry Knowledge: Proven experience implementing SAP within the construction, engineering, or heavy industry sectors in Egypt.
Project Management Mastery: Strong ability to track multiple SAP sub-projects simultaneously using rigorous methodology.
S/4HANA Experience: Familiarity with S/4HANA migrations or implementations is a significant advantage.
Problem-Solver: A "hands-on" approach to identifying system gaps and working with technical teams to bridge them.
Communication: Ability to explain SAP's complex logic to non-technical staff in simple, operational terms.

job_description:
Unleash Your Potential as a Network Engineer in Cairo, Egypt!

Are you a seasoned Network Engineer with a passion for building and maintaining robust, high-performance network infrastructures? We are seeking a talented and proactive individual to join our cutting-edge team as a Network Engineer. This is an incredible on-site opportunity in Cairo, Egypt, where your expertise will be pivotal in shaping our technological future. If you thrive in a dynamic environment and are ready to tackle complex challenges, read on – this role is designed for you!

Overview: As our Network Engineer, you will be the backbone of our digital operations, responsible for the design, implementation, and ongoing management of our critical network systems. You'll work with advanced technologies to ensure seamless connectivity, optimal performance, and ironclad security across our entire infrastructure.
Responsibilities:
Engineer and deploy resilient network solutions, including LAN/WAN, VPN, and data center networks, ensuring scalability and high availability.
Configure, manage, and troubleshoot a diverse range of network devices, including routers, switches, and firewalls from leading vendors like Cisco and Juniper.
Monitor network performance rigorously, proactively identify bottlenecks, and implement optimization strategies to enhance efficiency and uptime.
Develop and enforce robust network security policies and procedures to safeguard our data and systems.
Collaborate cross-functionally with IT teams to ensure seamless integration of network services and support various business initiatives.
Lead incident response and resolution for all network-related issues, minimizing downtime and impact.
Create and maintain comprehensive, accurate network documentation and diagrams.
Skills & Technologies: This role demands deep expertise in Network and Networking principles, with a strong foundation in Information Technology (IT). You'll bring proven experience with Cisco IOS/NX-OS and Juniper Junos OS, alongside proficiency in managing Routers, Switches, and Firewalls. A solid understanding of TCP/IP Protocols, VPN Technologies, and LAN/WAN Architecture is essential. A commitment to robust Network Security and exceptional Troubleshooting abilities will set you apart. Experience with Network Automation tools and Scripting (Python) is a significant advantage.
Growth Opportunities: We are committed to your professional development. You will have access to continuous learning resources, opportunities to pursue advanced industry certifications, and the chance to lead impactful projects. We foster an environment where your skills will evolve with emerging technologies, keeping you at the forefront of network engineering innovations.
Team & Culture: Join a collaborative, innovative, and highly skilled team that values knowledge sharing and mutual support. We believe in empowering our engineers to take ownership, propose creative solutions, and contribute directly to our success. Expect a supportive culture that champions continuous learning and professional growth.
Impact: Your work will be critical in ensuring the stability, security, and lightning-fast performance of our entire technological backbone. You will directly contribute to our operational excellence and enable our business to thrive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape. This role offers the chance to leave a lasting, positive mark on our infrastructure and our future.
job_requirements:
Mastery of Network Engineering:
A minimum of 4-7 years of dedicated, hands-on experience in a Network Engineer or similar senior-level role.
Profound expertise in Network and Networking principles, with an unshakeable foundation in Information Technology (IT) fundamentals.
Extensive practical experience with leading network operating systems, including Cisco IOS/NX-OS and Juniper Junos OS.
Proven capability in configuring, implementing, and managing enterprise-grade Routers, Switches, and Firewalls.
Deep understanding of TCP/IP Protocols, advanced VPN Technologies, and complex LAN/WAN Architecture.
A formidable grasp of Network Security best practices, incident response, and vulnerability management.
Exceptional Troubleshooting skills, with the ability to diagnose and resolve intricate network issues swiftly and effectively.
Familiarity with Network Automation principles and practical experience with Scripting (Python) for network tasks.
A track record of creating detailed and accurate network Documentation.
Education & Certifications: While specific degrees are valued, we place significant emphasis on relevant industry certifications (e.g., CCNP, JNCIP, CCIE, JNCIE) and a demonstrable portfolio of practical experience that showcases your network engineering prowess.
Career Level Expectations: This is an outstanding opportunity for an Experienced professional who is ready to lead complex projects, innovate solutions, and potentially mentor junior team members.

skills: Computer Science | Engineering | Information Technology (IT) | Security | System Administration
job_description:
Job Purpose:

 

The Root-CA Security Systems Administrator is responsible for the overall health, monitoring, and maintenance of the physical security systems supporting the Root Certificate Authority (Root-CA). This includes surveillance, access control, intrusion detection, and various data center systems. The role involves system diagnostics, troubleshooting, reporting, and ensuring compliance with security standards to maintain system integrity.

 

Job Accountabilities:

 

 Ensure the security, availability, and proper functioning of Root-CA systems through administrative, technical, and physical controls.
Manage and operate physical security systems, including access control, video surveillance (CCTV), intrusion detection, and environmental monitoring systems.
Administer and maintain data center physical infrastructure such as UPS, HVAC (temperature control), fire suppression, and water leak detection systems.
Continuously monitor system health, manage alarms, perform backups, and archive logs/events.
Diagnose and troubleshoot system access issues, hardware/software faults, and component failures.
 Investigate system failures and security incidents, recommend corrective actions, and coordinate with vendors for resolution.
Perform basic Linux administration tasks (user management, access control, file permissions, and log review).
Support the implementation of security-related projects, including system upgrades, installations, and integrations.
Apply cybersecurity best practices to protect systems against common threats (e.g., malware, ransomware, unauthorized access).
Review and audit system logs regularly to ensure compliance with security policies and standards.
Prepare and submit daily/periodic reports covering system status, alarms, incidents, and operational issues.
Maintain up-to-date technical documentation, including system configurations, backup records, and maintenance logs.
Report security incidents, system outages, and risks in a timely and structured manner.
Coordinate with internal teams, management, and external vendors to resolve issues and enhance system performance.
Continuously assess and improve physical security controls and operational procedures.
job_requirements:
Education:

 

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.

 

Required Experience:

 

2 – 3 years of experience in systems administration, physical security systems.
Strong decision-making skills with the ability to identify alternatives and solutions to technical issues

 

Required Skills:

 

 Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
Solid knowledge of physical security systems (e.g., CCTV, access control, intrusion detection) and data center operations.
Familiarity with Linux operating systems and basic networking concepts (IP addressing, DNS, DHCP).
Understanding of cybersecurity principles and common threat mitigation techniques.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to detail.
Ability to work proactively, prioritize tasks, and respond effectively to incidents.
Good documentation and reporting skills.

skills: Optimization Algorithms | AI Architecture | Machine Learning | Data Engineering | Problem Solving | Decision Intelligence | Team Leadership | Stakeholder Communication
job_description:
As a Principal AI Architect, you will define and govern the end-to-end technical architecture of Makkook’s Optimization & Decision Intelligence platform(s), and ensure we can deliver new customer implementations fast (target: ≤ 8 weeks per use case after core platform maturity).
Core Responsibilities:
Platform Architecture & Technical Strategy
Define platform architecture: modular components, data contracts, integration patterns, deployment topology (cloud/on-prem), and security/observability standards.
Design reusable “platform primitives”: canonical entities (resources/tasks/time/cost), constraint packs, objective templates, scenario manager, and explainability layer.
Make solver/stack decisions (build vs buy), and establish technical roadmaps with the CTO.
Optimization & Decision Engine Leadership
Lead modeling and solution strategy for key families:
Production planning & scheduling (sequence-dependent setups/changeovers, minimum run lengths, maintenance windows)
Workforce allocation and shift planning
Routing, dispatching, and fleet assignment
Inventory/replenishment and supply chain planning
Set standards for model formulation, performance, scalability, and stability (runtime budgets, warm starts, decomposition, heuristics/hybrids where needed).
Build a repeatable benchmarking harness and KPI framework (cost, service, risk, feasibility rate, runtime).
Feasibility, Diagnostics & Explainability
Own the approach to infeasibility detection and repair (constraint relaxation strategies, IIS where applicable, actionable diagnostics).
Ensure decisions are explainable to operations teams (constraints hit, trade-offs, what changed vs previous plan, reason codes).
Delivery & Engineering Excellence
Partner with PM/Delivery to define scope, milestones, acceptance criteria, and technical risk management.
Guide integrations with ERP/WMS/TMS/CMMS/SCADA and production data pipelines.
Establish OptOps practices: versioning, monitoring, runtime regressions, rollback, and quality gates.
Technical Leadership
Mentor AI engineers (including those coming from NLP/CV backgrounds) into OR/Optimization craftsmanship.
Run architecture reviews, ADRs, and enforce best practices across code, models, and deployments.
job_requirements:
7+ years in applied optimization / operations research / decision intelligence, with hands-on delivery experience.
Strong track record in building and deploying optimization systems using one or more of:
MILP / MIP, CP/CP-SAT, decomposition, heuristics/metaheuristics, hybrid strategies.
Ability to translate real operations into formal models (capacities, time windows, setup/changeover, batching, minimum run lengths, resource calendars, SLAs).
Solid software engineering fundamentals for production systems (clean architecture, testing, CI/CD mindset, performance profiling).
Experience integrating decision engines into real enterprise environments (APIs, event-driven patterns, data pipelines, on-prem constraints).
Clear communication: can explain complex trade-offs to both engineers and operators.
Hands-on experience in: OR-Tools (CP-SAT), Gurobi/CPLEX, Pyomo, JuMP, or similar.
Experience with feasibility diagnostics (IIS, relaxation, reason codes, repair recommendations).
Experience in building “re-optimization loops” (daily/shift updates, warm starts, rolling-horizon planning).
Observability/monitoring: Prometheus/Grafana (or equivalent), structured logging, runtime regression monitoring.
Preferred to have domain exposure in manufacturing planning, logistics routing, retail replenishment, or supply chain optimization.
