skills: Computer Science | Customer Support | Database | Information Technology (IT) | SQL | Linux | Microsoft SQL Server | MySQL | Networking | Windows | Database Administration (DBA)
job_description:
Employment Type: Full-time (or Senior Contractor)
Reporting to: Head of Managed Services / Technical Lead
 

Role Summary
We are seeking an experienced Senior Database Administrator to lead database vendor-support activities and provide expert-level operational, performance, and architectural support across a heterogeneous environment (MongoDB, MySQL/MariaDB, Microsoft SQL Server, and others). This hands-on role is responsible for resolving critical tickets, driving stability and performance improvements, coordinating vendor escalations, and mentoring junior DBAs. The Senior DBA will be a key escalation point for complex incidents and lead database-related projects including migrations, HA designs, and automation.
 

Key Responsibilities

Serve as primary escalation engineer for complex database incidents and SLA breaches; lead incident response and post-incident root-cause analysis (RCA).
Troubleshoot and resolve high-severity tickets across MongoDB, MySQL/MariaDB, MS SQL Server, and other DBMS; coordinate cross-team and vendor escalations as required.
Design, implement and maintain high-availability, replication, clustering, sharding, and disaster recovery solutions; lead DR planning and periodic DR tests.
Lead performance tuning efforts: query optimization, indexing strategy, resource contention mitigation, and capacity planning for large-scale production systems.
Architect and execute database migrations and upgrades (on-prem ↔ cloud, cloud-to-cloud, major version upgrades), ensuring minimal downtime and reliable rollback plans.
Define and enforce database change control processes; review and approve schema changes and major configuration adjustments.
Implement and maintain robust backup/restore strategies (including point-in-time recovery) and ensure recoverability through regular restore testing.
Develop and maintain database security best practices: roles and permissions, encryption at rest/in transit, auditing, and compliance controls.
Build and improve observability and monitoring (alerts, dashboards, anomaly detection) using tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, New Relic, Percona Monitoring, or vendor solutions.
Automate repetitive operational tasks and integrate database operations into CI/CD pipelines using scripting (Python, Bash) and IaC tools (Ansible, Terraform).
Collaborate with application, infrastructure, and security teams to design scalable data architectures that meet performance, reliability, and compliance requirements.
Maintain thorough documentation: runbooks, SOPs, capacity forecasts, architecture diagrams, and vendor escalation procedures.
Mentor and coach junior DBAs and support engineers; lead knowledge transfer and run regular training sessions.
Participate in on-call rotation for critical incidents and provide after-hours support when required.
job_requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, or equivalent experience.
4+ years of hands-on DBA experience with strong, demonstrable expertise in at least two of: MongoDB, MySQL/MariaDB, Microsoft SQL Server.
Proven track record of resolving complex production incidents and driving long-term improvements.
Deep SQL expertise and experience optimizing complex queries, indexing strategies, and execution plans; familiarity with MongoDB query optimization and sharding strategies.
Strong experience with HA, replication, clustering, sharding, and disaster recovery design and operations.
Hands-on experience with cloud-managed database services (AWS RDS/Aurora, Azure SQL, Google Cloud SQL, MongoDB Atlas) and hybrid cloud deployments.
Experience with database migration projects, schema evolution strategies, and zero-downtime deployment techniques.
Proficiency with monitoring/observability tools and log analysis; strong diagnostic skills for performance and resource-related issues.
Scripting/automation skills (Python, Bash, PowerShell) and experience with configuration management / IaC (Ansible, Terraform, CI/CD tooling).
Solid understanding of Linux and Windows server environments, storage, and networking as they relate to database performance.
Excellent communication skills; comfortable coordinating with vendors (MongoDB, Microsoft, Oracle, etc.) and presenting technical information to stakeholders.
Strong documentation skills and commitment to operational excellence and compliance.
English proficiency required for vendor interaction and technical documentation.

Preferred / Nice-to-have

Certifications: MongoDB DBA, Microsoft Certified: Azure Database Administrator, MySQL/MariaDB certifications, or similar.
Experience with containerized databases and Kubernetes operators (e.g., MongoDB Kubernetes Operator, MySQL Operator).
Familiarity with observability platforms (ELK/EFK stacks), query profilers, and advanced performance tools (Query Store, EXPLAIN ANALYZE).
Prior experience working with global enterprise customers, RFP-managed services, or partner ecosystems (e.g., Dell Technologies).
Experience with security and compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC2, PCI-DSS).

Deliverables & KPIs

SLA adherence and mean time to resolution (MTTR) for high-severity incidents.
Reduction in recurring incidents (trend-based KPIs) after RCA implementations.
Successful execution of migrations/upgrades with minimal downtime.
Availability and reliability metrics for database platforms (uptime, replication lag).
Timeliness and quality of runbooks, documentation, and knowledge transfer sessions.

job_description:
Job Purpose:

We are seeking a proactive and customer-focused IT Help Desk to serve as the first point of contact for our employees' technical issues. You will be responsible for providing timely and effective technical assistance, resolving problems with hardware, software, and network systems, and ensuring a seamless technology experience for our end-users. The ideal candidate is a problem-solver with excellent communication skills and a passion for technology.

 

Key Responsibilities:

Technical Support & Troubleshooting (70%)

  Provide first-line technical support via phone, email, chat, and in-person requests.
  Diagnose and resolve hardware issues with laptops, desktops, printers, and mobile devices.
  Troubleshoot software problems related to operating systems (Windows, macOS), Microsoft 365 and a variety of business applications.
  Assist users with account management, including password resets, access permissions, and onboarding/offboarding.
  Escalate complex issues to Tier 2/3 support or specialized teams while maintaining ownership of the ticket and communication with the user.

 

System Administration & Maintenance (20%)

  Perform the initial setup, configuration, and deployment of new user equipment (laptops, phones, etc.).
  Assist in the management of user accounts and groups in Active Directory or Azure AD.
  Monitor system alerts and perform basic health checks on network connectivity and core services.
  Maintain accurate and up-to-date documentation in the IT knowledge base.

 

Customer Service & Communication (10%)

  Deliver exceptional, empathetic, and patient customer service to users of all technical skill levels.
  Clearly communicate technical information in a user-friendly, understandable manner.
  Manage and prioritize multiple support tickets, ensuring SLAs (Service Level Agreements) are met.
  Follow up with users to ensure their technical issues have been fully resolved.
job_requirements:
Qualifications & Skills

Required:

Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, or a related field, or equivalent work experience.
Proven experience (1-3 years) in a helpdesk or technical support role.
Strong knowledge of Microsoft Windows 10/11 and Microsoft 365 Suite (Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel).
Fundamental understanding of network concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN).
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
Outstanding written and verbal communication skills.
A patient, customer-oriented attitude with a genuine desire to help.

Preferred (Nice-to-Have):

Relevant professional certifications (e.g., CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft 365 Fundamentals, ITIL Foundation).
Experience with a professional ticketing system (e.g., Jira Service Management, Fresh service, Zendesk).
Basic experience with Active Directory and Azure AD for user management.
Familiarity with macOS and mobile device management (MDM).
Knowledge of remote desktop support tools.

About Sega-M

Sega-M Electrical Products is a leading Egyptian manufacturer of low and medium voltage panel boards and lighting solutions, serving major industrial and commercial projects across Egypt.​
We are growing our internal IT and ERP capabilities and looking for a motivated junior developer to support and enhance our Microsoft AX ERP system.​

 

Role Overview

You will work with our IT and business teams to develop, modify, and support modules and reports on Microsoft Dynamics AX using .NET and SQL.
This role is ideal for a junior developer with around 1 year of experience who wants strong hands-on exposure to ERP systems in a manufacturing environment.​

 

Key Responsibilities
Develop and maintain internal applications and tools using C# / .NET integrated with Microsoft AX.
Write and optimize SQL queries, views, and stored procedures to support ERP modules and reports.
Participate in customizing and enhancing Microsoft AX forms, reports, and workflows based on business requirements.
Support end users by analyzing issues, identifying root causes, and implementing fixes in coordination with IT and functional teams.​
Assist in testing new features, changes, and integrations before deployment to production.
Document technical changes, queries, and solutions in a clear and organized way.​
job_requirements:

Solid knowledge of SQL (preferably MS SQL Server): writing queries, joins, and basic stored procedures.

Experience with ERP systems is a plus; exposure to Microsoft Dynamics AX or D365 is a strong advantage.
Familiarity with web technologies (ASP.NET, HTML, JavaScript) is a plus.​
Good analytical skills, attention to detail, and eagerness to learn in a fast-paced manufacturing environment.

skills: RFID | Information Technology (IT) | Engineering | Computer Engineering | Systems Engineering | Computer Science | Library Systems | Low Current Systems (LC) | Network Engineering | Database Management | System Integration | Troubleshooting | Technical Documentation | Project Management | Communication Skills
job_description:
We are seeking a highly experienced RFID Solutions Architect & Implementation Lead to design, deploy, and optimize RFID systems across our library infrastructure. This role combines strategic system architecture, hands-on technical implementation, and project leadership.

The ideal candidate will lead the end-to-end RFID deployment for library and archival environments, including system design, hardware configuration, software integration, and operational optimization. You will work closely with IT teams, engineers, and library stakeholders to ensure seamless integration with existing systems and deliver a reliable RFID-enabled ecosystem.

*Key Responsibilities*

 

RFID System Architecture & Design
Design the complete RFID system architecture for library environments including security gates, self-check stations, handheld scanners, and RFID detection systems.
Conduct site surveys and technical assessments to determine optimal placement of RFID hardware.
Define technical specifications for RFID components including tags, readers, antennas, controllers, and middleware.
Develop scalable solutions that support large collections and multi-site library deployments.
 
Implementation & Deployment
Lead the installation, configuration, and commissioning of RFID systems across library locations.
Configure RFID tags and ensure proper tagging strategies for books, manuscripts, and archival materials.
Implement RFID hardware including gates, readers, antennas, handheld devices, and detectors.
Perform system testing, troubleshooting, and performance optimization.
System Integration
Integrate RFID systems with Library Management Systems (LMS) and enterprise platforms.
Ensure compatibility with databases and enterprise systems such as ERP and Business Applications.
Support customization and system development using programming languages such as C# or Java when required.
Ensure reliable data exchange between RFID systems and backend databases.
Technical Support & Training
Provide technical guidance and operational training to library and IT staff.
Develop detailed technical documentation, system diagrams, and operational procedures.
Provide ongoing system monitoring, maintenance, and troubleshooting support.
Project Management
Develop and manage a comprehensive RFID implementation roadmap.
Coordinate with stakeholders, vendors, and technical teams throughout the project lifecycle.
Track project KPIs, timelines, and deliverables to ensure successful deployment.
Identify project risks and implement mitigation strategies.
Standards & Compliance
Ensure compliance with international RFID standards including ISO/IEC 18000 and EPCglobal.
Follow industry best practices for RFID implementation, security, and system reliability.
job_requirements:
Required Qualifications
Proven experience in RFID system design and implementation, preferably within library, archival, or asset tracking environments.

job_title: Technical Support Engineer II - Fluent French
skills: Engineering | Information Technology (IT) | Technical Support | SaaS | XML | JSON | Wireshark | Fiddler | Salesforce | SQL | Computer Science | Python | jQuery
job_description:
Technical Support Engineer II - eSign - Fluent French

 

Help French-speaking customers across Europe and beyond keep their most important agreements moving with Docusign eSignature.

 

Why this role matters

Every day, organizations rely on Docusign so their deals, HR offers, and critical agreements can be signed quickly and securely. As a French-speaking Technical Support Engineer based in Egypt, you are both a strategic customer advisor and the internal voice of our French-speaking customers. You’ll work with a truly global team and will use your fluent French and strong English daily to take ownership of complex technical cases, collaborate across teams, and help customers get maximum value from Docusign eSignature. 
 

What you'll do

Provide outstanding technical support for Docusign eSignature (eSign) and associated services.
Handle inbound support requests and troubleshoot issues such as sending/signing envelopes, digital signatures, templates, bulk sending, and use of the eSignature web app.
Use your broad product and technical knowledge to drive adoption and help customers get more from Docusign.
Work hands-on with tools such as Salesforce, Jira, Docusign logging systems, SharePoint, internal admin consoles, browser developer tools, SQL and text analysis tools.
Investigate and identify bugs, product gaps and high‑impact improvements to enhance the overall customer experience.
Promote Docusign products and services through consultative conversations based on customer needs.
Handle escalated cases from internal teams to resolve complex issues.
Support internal peers with product knowledge, troubleshooting approaches and best‑practice engagement paths.
Meet and exceed Docusign Customer Support service level goals for your eSign areas of expertise.
 

You’ll report to a Manager, Technical Support and work closely with Support, Engineering, Product, Customer Success and Sales.

 

How you’ll work

Job designation: Remote (Egypt)
You’ll work from a designated remote location in Egypt, collaborating virtually with teammates and customers across time zones. Roles at Docusign are designated as In Office, Hybrid or Remote based on the position; designations may change over time in line with business needs and local law.
job_requirements:
What you bring

 

Your core strengths: 

Fluent French with strong English (written and spoken) for daily collaboration across global teams.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field, or equivalent hands‑on experience in a technical support environment. 
2+ years troubleshooting SaaS products in a Technical Support (or similar) role, preferably in a customer-facing capacity.
Comfortable working with web-based environments (HTTP, JSON, IIS, HTML, CSS) and at least some of: XML, C#, Python, PHP, JavaScript, jQuery.
Confident using log and network analysis tools (e.g. Wireshark, Fiddler, Charles Proxy, browser developer tools) to get to the root cause.
Exposure to Salesforce administration, Microsoft, Dynamics and/or SharePoint administration. 

 

Nice to Have: 

Deeper technical skills such as regular expressions, web service APIs, SQL / SOQL, Dynatrace or other monitoring tools, and authentication technologies like SAML and OAuth.
Industry experience in sectors where Docusign provides solutions.
Experience supporting Docusign eSignature or similar eSignature / agreement platforms, and familiarity with Docusign user models.
Strong communication skills with customers, peers and occasional executive stakeholders, especially in high‑pressure situations.
Certifications or experience such as Salesforce Admin, Microsoft System Administration, or Windows PowerShell scripting

Department

IT Manager

Role Summary

The ERP Functional Lead – Odoo is responsible for managing, optimizing, and supporting the organization’s Odoo ERP platform. This role leads the functional design, implementation, and continuous improvement of ERP processes across departments.

The position acts as the primary bridge between business stakeholders and the technical development team, ensuring business requirements are translated into effective system solutions.

Beyond initial implementation, this role assumes long-term ownership of the ERP platform, ensuring system stability, user adoption, and continuous enhancement aligned with organizational growth and operational needs.

Key Responsibilities
ERP Implementation & Optimization
Lead functional analysis and system design during ERP implementation projects.
Translate business requirements into clear functional specifications for the technical team.
Design and optimize business processes using Odoo ERP capabilities and best practices.
Identify automation opportunities to improve operational efficiency.
Business Process Management
Collaborate closely with departments including Finance, HR, Supply Chain, Sales, and Operations.
Analyze existing workflows and redesign them using ERP best practices.
Ensure strong alignment between business operations and ERP system functionality.
System Ownership & Continuous Improvement
Own the functional performance and governance of the ERP system after go-live.
Continuously evaluate and improve ERP processes and user adoption.
Identify opportunities to introduce new modules, features, or automation.
Ensure the ERP platform evolves with the company’s growth and operational needs.
Team Coordination
Coordinate with internal development teams and external vendors when required.
Provide clear functional explanations and business logic to developers.
Prioritize system enhancements and improvement initiatives.
System Configuration & Functional Management
Configure and manage key Odoo modules including:
Accounting
Sales
Purchase
Inventory
HR
Monitor system performance and configuration integrity.
Review system changes and enhancements before deployment.
Testing & Quality Assurance
Define test scenarios and acceptance criteria for system updates and new features.
Lead User Acceptance Testing (UAT) processes.
Ensure system stability before releasing updates into production.
User Support & Training
Provide functional support to ERP users across departments.
Conduct training sessions to improve system adoption and user proficiency.
Develop and maintain functional documentation and user guides.
Governance & ERP Strategy
Establish ERP best practices and governance standards across departments.
Ensure consistent system usage across companies, branches, and business units.
Support leadership with ERP-driven insights and process improvement initiatives.

Experience in business process mapping and system design.
Ability to translate business requirements into system solutions.
Strong communication, stakeholder management, and coordination skills.
Required Experience
5+ years experience working with ERP systems.
Proven experience with Odoo ERP functional implementation.
Experience managing ERP implementation and post-go-live support.
Experience collaborating with technical teams and developers.
Preferred Background
Candidates may come from roles such as:
Odoo Functional Consultant
ERP Business Analyst
ERP Functional Lead
Digital Transformation Specialist

job_description:
Position Overview
 

We are seeking an experienced Product Owner to lead the development and continuous enhancement of our HR & Attendance Management System.

The selected candidate will be responsible for defining the product vision, managing its lifecycle, and ensuring seamless integration with payroll, leave management, end-of-service calculations, biometric devices, and governmental wage protection systems (WPS/SIF where applicable).

This role requires a strong understanding of HR operations, labor law compliance, payroll cycles, and agile product execution within a B2B environment.

⸻

 Key Responsibilities

1️⃣ Product Vision & Strategy
• Define and maintain a clear product vision and roadmap for the HR & Attendance system.
• Lead the development of features related to attendance tracking, shift management, leave management, payroll inputs, overtime, and end-of-service calculations.
• Ensure compliance with local labor laws and regulatory requirements.

2️⃣ B2B Client Requirement Analysis
• Engage directly with HR, Finance, and IT departments of client organizations.
• Gather and analyze business requirements (attendance policies, overtime rules, deductions, device integrations).
• Translate business needs into detailed functional and technical specifications.

3️⃣ Backlog Ownership & Prioritization
• Own and prioritize the product backlog.
• Write clear user stories with well-defined acceptance criteria.
• Balance client demands, product enhancements, and compliance requirements to maximize value delivery.

4️⃣ Integrations & System Connectivity
• Oversee integration with:
• Biometric attendance devices
• Payroll systems
• ERP platforms
• Wage Protection Systems (WPS/SIF where applicable)
• Ensure stable synchronization and accurate data mapping across systems.

5️⃣ System Performance & Stability
• Monitor system performance and database reliability.
• Analyze recurring client issues and implement long-term improvements.
• Ensure payroll-related calculations and attendance reports are accurate and reliable.

6️⃣ User Experience & Adoption
• Collaborate with UX/UI teams to enhance HR user experience.
• Simplify dashboards, workflows, and reporting structures.
• Support UAT sessions and client training initiatives.

7️⃣ Compliance & Data Security
• Ensure employee data protection and confidentiality.
• Maintain adherence to internal security standards and access control policies.
• Review and optimize role-based access permissions.

8️⃣ Reporting & Analytics
• Provide periodic performance and product usage reports.
• Analyze system data to support strategic product decisions.
• Track KPIs related to system adoption, errors, and client satisfaction.
job_requirements:
Required Skills & Competencies

✔ HR & Attendance System Expertise
• Practical experience in:
• Attendance & Time Tracking Systems
• Leave Management
• Payroll inputs and overtime calculations
• End-of-Service (EOS) processes
• Strong understanding of payroll cycles and HR operational workflows.

✔ Technical Understanding
• Experience with biometric device integration.
• Knowledge of APIs and ERP integrations.
• Familiarity with SaaS-based systems is a plus.

✔ Analytical & Operational Skills
• Strong data analysis and troubleshooting abilities.
• Ability to understand and optimize complex HR workflows.

✔ Communication & Client Management
• Experience dealing directly with corporate clients (B2B).
• Ability to lead requirement gathering sessions and UAT meetings.
• Strong documentation and presentation skills.

⸻

Education & Experience
• Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, Business Administration, or related field.
• Minimum 3–5 years of experience as:
• Product Owner
• Business Analyst
• HR System Consultant
• Agile/Scrum certifications are preferred.

job_description:
Unlock Your Potential as a Senior Network and Security Engineer!

 

Are you a seasoned network and security expert ready to take your career to the next level? Join our dynamic team as a Senior Network and Security Engineer and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our organization's network infrastructure. We're seeking a passionate and driven individual to design, implement, and maintain robust network and security solutions. Based in beautiful Nicosia, Cyprus, this is a fully remote opportunity, allowing you to work from the comfort of your home while making a global impact.

 

What You'll Do:

Design and implement secure network solutions, including firewalls, intrusion detection/prevention systems, and VPNs.
Manage and maintain network infrastructure, ensuring optimal performance and reliability.
Configure and troubleshoot network devices, such as routers, switches, and firewalls (Fortinet, Checkpoint).
Conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments to identify and mitigate risks.
Develop and maintain network security policies and procedures.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of network and security solutions.
Stay up-to-date with the latest security threats and trends, and proactively implement measures to protect our network.
Contribute to the evolution of our Software-Defined Networking (SDN) strategy.
 

Why Join Us?

This is more than just a job; it's an opportunity to make a significant impact on a growing organization. You'll be part of a collaborative and supportive team that values innovation and continuous learning. We offer excellent growth opportunities, a competitive salary, and a comprehensive benefits package. Your expertise will directly contribute to safeguarding our critical infrastructure and enabling our business to thrive. Embrace the flexibility of remote work while building a rewarding career in a dynamic environment.
job_requirements:
Your Expertise Will Make a Difference!

 

We are looking for a highly motivated and skilled individual who possesses the following qualifications:

 

Experience: 3-5 years of experience in network engineering and security.
Core Skills: Proven expertise in Networking, Network Security, and Switching.
Firewall Expertise: Hands-on experience with Fortinet and Checkpoint firewalls.
SDN Knowledge: Solid understanding of Software-Defined Networking (SDN) principles and technologies.
Security Acumen: Strong knowledge of security best practices, risk assessment methodologies, and compliance standards.
Troubleshooting Skills: Excellent troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
Communication Skills: Ability to communicate technical concepts effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Routing and Switching: Strong grasp of routing protocols (e.g., BGP, OSPF) and switching technologies.
Certifications: Industry-recognized certifications (e.g., CCNA Security, CISSP) are a plus.

 

If you're ready to take on this exciting challenge and contribute your expertise to a dynamic team, we encourage you to apply!

job_description:
Role

Dewan Architects & Engineers is a global design consultancy firm with 900+ professionals across offices in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Vietnam, the Philippines, and Iraq. We are seeking an Identity & Access Management (IAM) Specialist to join our Cairo office. In this role, you will own and support IAM operations across the organization, ensuring the right people have the right access to the right systems at the right time, while strengthening security through best-practice controls, automation, and governance. You will work closely with IT, Information Security, and business stakeholders, and support other regional offices during standard business hours (M–F; 8:00am – 5:00pm).

 

What You Will Do

Communicate and collaborate effectively with all levels of staff from end users to managers and Principals to deliver secure, user-friendly access solutions.
Manage the Joiner–Mover–Leaver (JML) lifecycle: provisioning, access changes, and timely deprovisioning.
Administer and maintain identity platforms (e.g., Microsoft Active Directory / Entra ID) including groups, roles, and access policies.
Implement and support SSO, MFA, conditional access, and federation for enterprise and cloud applications (e.g., SAML, OAuth/OIDC).
Enforce least-privilege access using RBAC/ABAC concepts; review privileged access and support PAM controls where applicable.
Own IAM governance activities: periodic access reviews/recertifications, role design, approvals workflow, and segregation-of-duties support.
Integrate and onboard applications into IAM (SaaS, on-prem, and cloud), partnering with application owners to define access models.
Support identity-related incident response (e.g., suspicious logins, compromised accounts, access misuse) and improve preventive controls.
Maintain accurate records for access requests, approvals, reviews, and audit evidence; create and update IAM documentation and SOPs.
Contribute to IT security and infrastructure projects as required and continually expand knowledge of Dewan’s technology landscape.
Demonstrate ethical and professional behavior and adherence to company policies and procedures.
job_requirements:
Qualifications

 

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Cybersecurity, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
3+ years of hands-on experience in IAM / Access Management / Directory Services in an enterprise environment.
Strong working knowledge of Active Directory, Entra ID (Azure AD), group/role management, and identity lifecycle processes.
Experience with SSO and federation (SAML 2.0, OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect) and MFA/conditional access policy design.
Familiarity with ticketing processes, change control, and maintaining clear support records in a fast-paced environment.
Strong troubleshooting and communication skills; ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Willingness to participate in occasional off-hours/weekend support for upgrades and initiatives.

 

Bonus Points

Experience with IAM vendors (e.g., Okta, Ping, SailPoint, Saviynt, Microsoft Identity Manager / Entra ID Governance).
Scripting/automation skills (PowerShell, Python) for provisioning, reporting, and audit evidence generation.
Security certifications (e.g., SC-300, AZ-500, Security+, CISSP) or ITIL.

Experience supporting geographically distributed operations and multi-region access requirements.

Role

 

Dewan Architects & Engineers is a global design consultancy firm with 900+ professionals across offices in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Vietnam, the Philippines, and Iraq. We are seeking an IT Business Analyst to join our Enterprise Technology function. In this role, you will support business analysis and digital change initiatives across AEC workflows (design, engineering, project delivery, commercial, and support functions), translating business needs into clear requirements and actionable delivery plans. You will partner with stakeholders and delivery teams to implement solutions across core platforms (CDE/BIM, PMIS, ERP, collaboration, and integrations), ensuring adoption, value realization, and governance. You will report to the Head of the Enterprise Technology Department (ETD) and work closely with solution architects, vendors, and BI/Data teams to deliver integrated outcomes.

 

Responsibilities 

 

Lead business analysis activities for assigned initiatives; apply BA standards, templates, and quality controls for requirements and documentation.
Partner with business leaders (Design, PMO, Construction, Commercial, Finance, HR, Procurement) to understand priorities and shape delivery roadmaps.
Report to the Head of ETD and collaborate with solution architects, engineers, vendors, and business owners to deliver fit-for-purpose solutions.
Facilitate discovery workshops to map current-state processes and design future-state workflows across the project lifecycle (tender → design → construction → handover).
Elicit, analyze, and document business, functional, non-functional, and reporting requirements; maintain traceability through delivery and change control.

job_title: Technical Recruiter / Technical Software Engineer (Hiring & Candidate Evaluation)
skills: Technical Recruitment | Technical Screening | Candidate Evaluation | Interviewing | Talent acquisition | English Fluency | Technical Assessment | Coding Test Review | Candidate Verification | Recruitment Strategy | Communication Skills | Backend Engineering | Python | JavaScript
job_description:
We are looking for a highly capable Technical Recruiter / Technical Software Engineer to help us recruit, assess, and validate software engineering candidates.

This role is not limited to sourcing candidates. The ideal person must be able to thoroughly screen applicants, evaluate their technical depth, verify their real capabilities, and assess their English fluency to ensure only strong candidates move forward.

You will be responsible for managing the recruiting and evaluation process for software engineering talent, with a strong focus on technical accuracy, communication quality, and independent verification.

 

Key Responsibilities:

Source and identify strong software engineering candidates

Conduct initial screening interviews

Evaluate candidates’ technical background and real hands-on ability

Assess spoken and written English fluency and ensure candidates can communicate clearly and professionally

Administer technical assessments, coding tasks, and screening tests

Personally verify candidate test submissions for quality, correctness, and authenticity

Confirm that candidates have genuinely passed the required evaluation criteria before recommending them

Filter out weak, exaggerated, or non-genuine applicants

Maintain a high hiring bar and only present thoroughly vetted candidates
job_requirements:
Strong technical background in software engineering or computer science
Prior experience in technical recruiting, technical interviewing, or engineering candidate assessment
Ability to understand and evaluate software engineering skills across common stacks such as Python, JavaScript, backend systems, APIs, and related technologies
Strong ability to independently review coding tests and validate whether a candidate truly meets the required standard
Excellent written and spoken English
Must be able to assess whether a candidate’s English is fluent and work-ready
Strong judgment, attention to detail, and ability to detect weak or misleading candidate performance
Organized, reliable, and capable of handling multiple candidates efficiently

 

Ideal Candidate:
The ideal candidate is someone who combines technical engineering understanding with strong recruiting judgment. You should be comfortable not only interviewing candidates, but also challenging their answers, reviewing their test performance in depth, and making sure they genuinely meet the required level in both technical skill and English communication.

نبحث عن مدير منتج يؤمن بأن بناء المنتجات يبدأ بالفهم العميق للمشكلة. هذا الدور يركّز على استكشاف الفرص، فهم المستخدمين، وتحليل السوق، وليس مجرد متابعة تنفيذ فريق التطوير.
 

مدير المنتج في هذا الدور يقود مرحلة البحث والتحليل والتجارب، ويحوّل الرؤى إلى فرص منتجات قابلة للنمو.
 

المسؤوليات الرئيسية
قيادة أنشطة استكشاف المنتجات (Product Discovery) لفهم المشكلات والفرص في السوق.
إجراء مقابلات المستخدمين والعملاء المحتملين واستخلاص الرؤى القابلة للتطبيق.
تنفيذ بحوث السوق لفهم الاتجاهات والفرص غير المستغلة.
تحليل المنافسين والمنتجات البديلة لفهم تموضع المنتج واستراتيجيات التفوق.

job_description:
Job Description

Your Impact:

As a Software Developer at Renewable Energy Pros, you will play a pivotal role in shaping and advancing our cutting-edge energy storage software platform. This position combines design sensibility with technical expertise, empowering you to lead the development of intuitive user interfaces, conceptualize and implement innovative features, and ensure our platform evolves in response to client needs. Your collaborative creativity and technical execution will drive scalability and innovation, directly contributing to our mission of creating a resilient and efficient energy ecosystem for generations to come.

Job Description:

In this role, you will:

Apply knowledge of UI design and software engineering to design and develop new user interfaces and interaction models using the Python Pyside framework.
Create and make decisions that implement a consistent design language throughout the Storlytics Software platform.
Collaborate with the application development team and lead the design and development of the user interface for the Storlytics software.
Optimize Storlytics software UI for maximum speed, responsiveness, and scalability.
Development and maintenance of our website frontend and backend.
Create and maintain test suites to perform quality control before software version releases.
Contribute to existing codebases, design systems, and themes; connect ideas across teams.
Collaborate across time zones via TEAMS, GitHub comments, documents, and frequent videoconferences.
job_requirements:
Basic Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field, with evidence of exceptional ability.
Excellent knowledge in the programming language Python.
Excellent experience in the following frameworks/libraries: Pyside, Pandas, Matplotlib, Numpy, Django, and ReactJS
Understanding of object-oriented programming (OOP) concepts
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
Knowledge of basic web development concepts (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
Excellent command of English, both spoken and written.

 

Preferred Qualifications

Master’s degree in computer engineering or a related field.
Previous Software development experience.
Experience with Python programming (expert level).
Experience in creating interactive UI in Python
Experience with version control systems (Git, GitHub, or GitLab)
Strong organizational, technical writing, and communication skills.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a project team.
Eagerness to learn and tackle new challenges.
Thrive in fast-paced environments with a proactive mindset.

 

About Us

Renewable Energy Pros is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, serves clients in over 30 countries. As a leader in energy storage technology, we deliver cutting-edge software solutions that optimize the design and implementation of grid-tied energy storage systems. Our platform empowers utilities and energy storage developers to accurately model lifecycle costs and adapt to an ever-evolving energy landscape. At Storlytics, you’ll be part of a dynamic and innovative team driving meaningful change in renewable energy.

job_description:
The Role

We’re building our core architecture and need a hands-on Tech Lead to lead execution. You will be the technical authority for our in-house team, setting engineering standards, making practical trade-offs, and ensuring we ship reliable production-grade software. You will own delivery, system stability, and mentoring.

What You Will Do
Lead & Mentor: Lead the team through complex requirements, raise engineering quality, and keep execution moving with clear standards and follow-ups.
Partner with the PM: Work closely with “and listen openly to” the Product manager to translate business needs into technical plans and communicate trade-offs early to design scalable customer-oriented software.
Own the Architecture: design clean Odoo customizations and integrations, manage ORM/performance limits, and build for growth without over-engineering.
Tackle the Hard Problems: Build a clear escalation and troubleshooting process so issues are reported properly and team members get unstuck. You know how to find solutions even if you have not seen the issue before.
Ensure Production Readiness: Set release practices, maintain living documentation, and enforce deployment discipline (e.g. upgrades, security rules, and concurrency.)

Experience leading developers and implementers (and working with designers), setting and enforcing standards, and delivering under pressure without burning out the team.
 
Full-Stack Odoo Breadth: Strong JavaScript for Odoo web/POS, Strong PostgreSQL, and Docker and private deployments. Comfortable with Linux server administration.

skills: Problem Solving | Communication | Time Management | SAP
job_description:
The role

The SAP PP/QM Consultant is responsible for the design, configuration, implementation, and support of SAP Production Planning (PP) and Quality Management (QM) modules. This role involves working closely with business stakeholders to understand their requirements, translating them into effective SAP solutions, and ensuring the smooth operation of production and quality processes. The consultant will also play a key role in system enhancements, troubleshooting, and providing expert advice on best practices.

Key responsibilities

Configure SAP PP modules, including master data (material master, bill of materials, routing, work centers), demand management, material requirements planning (MRP), production orders, and capacity planning.
Configure SAP QM modules, including quality planning, quality inspection, quality notifications, and quality certificates.
Design and implement production planning strategies to optimize manufacturing processes.
Implement inspection plans, sampling procedures, and quality control processes.
Configure and manage production versions, scheduling, and shop floor control.
Configure and manage quality master data, including inspection characteristics and catalogs.
Ensure the accuracy and integrity of system configurations and data.
Troubleshoot and resolve system issues and defects.
Provide support to end users.
Provide ongoing support for SAP PP and QM modules, including incident resolution and problem management.
Integrate PP with other SAP modules, such as MM, SD, and FI/CO.
Integrate QM with PP and MM for in-process and goods receipt inspections.
job_requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Business Administration, or a related field.
1 to 3 years of experience in SAP PP and QM configuration and implementation.
Strong understanding of manufacturing processes and quality management principles.
Hands-on experience with SAP PP and QM modules, including master data, MRP, production orders, inspection plans, and quality notifications.
Experience with SAP integration with other modules (MM, SD, FI/CO).
Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
SAP certification in PP and/or QM is highly desirable.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Excellent command of English

Location: Remote (Egypt) or On-Site (Tripoli, Libya)
Company: Jadawel Stationery & Office Equipment / The Toy Store Libya
Employment Type: Full-Time — Senior Management Role
About Us
Jadawel Stationery & Office Equipment and The Toy Store Libya are among Libya’s leading retail and wholesale businesses in stationery, educational supplies, toys, and office equipment. With a large physical retail presence and nationwide distribution capabilities, we are now investing heavily in building a market-leading e-commerce and omnichannel operation.
Role Overview
We are seeking an experienced and commercially driven Head of E-Commerce & Omnichannel Growth to lead the strategy, development, and execution of our online retail and wholesale channels.
This role is accountable for driving online revenue, improving customer experience, optimizing operations, and integrating digital channels with our physical retail and distribution network.
The successful candidate will function as a business leader — not just a marketing or technical specialist.
Key Responsibilities
Revenue Growth & Strategy
Own and deliver online sales targets and profitability
Develop and execute the overall e-commerce strategy
Identify new growth opportunities across B2C and B2B channels
Optimize pricing, promotions, and product mix
Product & Merchandising Management
Oversee online catalog development and product presentation
Plan seasonal campaigns (Back-to-School, Ramadan, Eid, etc.)
Create bundles, kits, and promotional offers
Manage slow-moving inventory through online initiatives
Operations & Fulfilment
Design and optimize order processing workflows
Improve delivery reliability and customer satisfaction
Manage returns and after-sales processes
Coordinate with warehouse and logistics teams
Digital Marketing & Customer Acquisition
Lead performance marketing strategy across social media and digital channels
Oversee paid advertising, retargeting, and campaign optimization
Develop customer retention and loyalty initiatives
Manage online brand presence
B2B / Wholesale Channel Development
Develop and grow online wholesale and institutional sales
Create bulk pricing strategies and account programs
Support schools, offices, and resellers
Data, Analytics & Systems Integration
Analyze sales performance and customer behavior
Monitor key KPIs and prepare management reports
Leverage inventory and ERP data to drive decisions
Recommend system improvements and automation
Leadership & Cross-Functional Coordination
Work closely with retail, procurement, and logistics teams
Manage external vendors and service providers
Build and lead a future e-commerce team

job_description:
Develop, implement, and maintain comprehensive software quality control processes and test strategies for complex IT solutions.
Design, execute, and document detailed test plans, test cases, and test scripts to ensure software meets functional and non-functional requirements.
Collaborate closely with software development, product management, and system integration teams to define quality objectives and resolve issues.
Lead root cause analysis and troubleshooting for defects, ensuring timely resolution and continuous improvement.
Conduct manual or automated testing across multiple platforms, including web, mobile, and enterprise applications.
Review and validate requirements, specifications, and technical design documents to provide timely and meaningful feedback.
Mentor and guide junior QA engineers, fostering a culture of quality and best practices within the team.
Monitor and report on key quality metrics, test coverage, and defect trends to stakeholders and management.
Ensure compliance with industry standards, security protocols, and regulatory requirements in all quality control activities.
Continuously research and recommend new tools, techniques, and methodologies to enhance the effectiveness and efficiency of the quality control process.

4-6 years of professional experience in software quality control, quality assurance, or software testing.
experience in designing and executing test plans, test cases, and automated test scripts.

Experience with test tools and frameworks (e.g., Selenium, JUnit, TestNG).
Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills.
Ability to work effectively in a hybrid work arrangement, balancing remote and onsite collaboration.
Exceptional communication skills for cross-functional teamwork and reporting.
Attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality software products.

job_description:
Job summary :

 

The CIO  is responsible for leading the overall technology strategy of the group. He/ She should ensure that IT systems, digital platforms, and data initiatives support business growth, enhance customer experience, optimize operations, and drive innovation across stores, e-commerce, and supply chain networks.

 

Areas of Accountabilities :

1. Strategic Leadership

-Develop and execute the company’s IT and digital transformation strategy aligned with business goals.

-Partner with CEO, CFO, COO, and other executives to support growth initiatives.

-Lead innovation in omnichannel retail, data analytics, and customer engagement technologies.

-Identify emerging technologies to improve competitiveness.

2. IT Infrastructure & Operations

-Oversee enterprise systems including but not limited to ERP systems, POS systems, E-commerce platforms

CRM systems.

-Supply chain and warehouse management systems

-Ensure high availability, security, and scalability of systems.

-Manage cloud strategy and infrastructure modernization.

-Maintain disaster recovery and business continuity plans.

3. Digital & Omnichannel Experience

-Lead digital commerce initiatives (website, mobile app, marketplace integrations).

-Enhance in-store technology (self-checkout, mobile POS, inventory tracking).

-Improve customer journey across online and physical stores.

4. Cybersecurity & Risk Management

Establish strong cybersecurity governance.

Ensure compliance with data privacy regulations.

Manage IT risk assessments and mitigation plans.

Protect customer payment and personal information.

5. Data & Analytics

Build enterprise data strategy.

Implement business intelligence and analytics platforms.

Enable data-driven decision making.

Lead AI and predictive analytics initiatives.

6. Vendor & Budget Management

Manage IT budget and optimize technology investments.

Negotiate contracts with technology vendors.

Evaluate build vs. buy decisions.

Oversee outsourced IT partners.

7. Team Leadership

Lead IT teams including infrastructure, applications, security, and data.

Recruit and develop top technical talent.

Foster a culture of innovation and continuous improvement.

About COMTEC: 

Comtec is Egypt's Leader in Security Solutions with over 70% market share securing various sensitive buildings and sites ranging from malls, embassies, ministries & hotels. Comtec has succeeded in providing the market with the latest innovations in security equipment over many years.

About the Job: 

COMTEC, Egypt's leader in security solutions with over 70% market share, is looking for a skilled Product Manager to join our team. As a Product Manager, you will play a crucial role in promoting our products and services to various clients, coordinating with consultants, and supporting the sales team in pre-tender phases. You will also be responsible for conducting security analysis for client sites and recommending the best security solutions to meet their needs.

In this role, you will work closely with the Commercial department to ensure our products meet client specifications, while also performing competitive analysis to keep us ahead in the market. Your technical expertise, combined with strong sales and communication skills, will ensure our solutions are properly represented and supported throughout the sales cycle.

Job Description

Promote the organization’s products and services to various clients.
Understand market competition and Perform competitive analysis for the organization’s products.
Responsible for specifying the organization’s products with consultants specialized in security sector.
Conduct frequent technical awareness meetings with Consultants to ensure they stay updated and biased to our specifications.
Work in coordination with Sales Team in pre-tender phase to specify the organization’s products in advance.
Provide in-house technical support for Sales Team.
Assist Sales Team in conducting meetings with clients to emphasize the competency of the organization’s products.
Establish proper connection with engineering department at client side to assist the organization in securing the deal.
Perform security analysis for client’s site and recommend proper solutions to meet the client needs.

Excellent communication & interpersonal skills.
Excellent command in English language.
Ability to work under pressure in multi-tasking environment.

job_description:
About the Role：
​As a Senior Full-Stack Developer at Roaya, you will play a pivotal role Working directly under the Tech Lead, you will take ownership of end-to-end features—from architecting robust SQL databases and C# APIs to crafting high-performance user interfaces in Angular.

 

This role is ideal for a developer who enjoys high-stakes environments and mission-critical applications.

​Key Responsibilities：

 

​Architecture & Development: Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using C#, .NET Core/8+, and Angular.
​Backend Excellence: Build and optimize secure RESTful APIs and handle complex business logic for cloud-based mail services.
​Database Management: Write high-performance SQL Server queries, stored procedures, and design efficient database schemas.
​Frontend Innovation: Create responsive, modular, and reusable UI components using Angular (TypeScript), ensuring a seamless user experience.
​Code Quality: Conduct thorough code reviews, mentor junior team members, and implement unit/integration testing to ensure zero-downtime deployments.
​Collaboration: Work closely with the Tech Lead to translate business requirements from World Posta into technical specifications.
job_requirements:
Technical Requirements：

​3–4+ years of professional experience in Full-Stack development.
​Expertise in C# and .NET: Deep understanding of ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, and LINQ.
​Angular Mastery: Proficiency in Angular (latest versions), RxJS, and State Management.
​SQL Server: Strong experience with relational database design and performance tuning.
​Web Fundamentals: Excellent command of HTML5, CSS3 (Sass/Less), and modern JavaScript/TypeScript.
​Important Skills to Look For (Bonus)
​To truly excel in a cloud and mail service environment like Roaya’s, look for these additional strengths:

job_description:
About the job

About the Role

We are seeking a Service Desk Manager to lead our Egypt‑based service desk team supporting international clients, primarily in Canada.

 

This role is responsible for the day‑to‑day performance, reliability, and quality of service desk operations. The Service Desk Manager combines people leadership with active involvement in higher‑priority or complex work, ensuring the team operates with consistency, professionalism, and clear accountability.

 

You will act as the primary operational owner of the service desk in Egypt and the key point of coordination with Canada‑based service delivery leadership.

 

What You Are Accountable For

A service desk that operates predictably, calmly, and with clear ownership
Tickets handled with the right priority, quality, and follow‑through
Analysts who understand expectations and are supported through coaching and structure
Issues escalated early and correctly, with clear summaries and ownership
Professional, consistent communication with clients and Canada‑based teams
Continuous improvement in how work is handled, documented, and handed over

 

Key Responsibilities

Service Desk Operations & Leadership

Lead daily service desk activities, including prioritization and workload balancing
Maintain visibility over ticket queues, backlogs, and aging work
Ensure incidents and requests are handled in line with agreed service levels
Take ownership of operational issues and resolve them before they escalate
Ensure client communication is timely, clear, and professional

 

Team Management & Coaching

Directly manage Service Desk Analysts based in Egypt
Set schedules and ensure coverage aligns with business needs
Provide regular coaching, feedback, and performance guidance
Support skill development and knowledge sharing within the team
Address performance issues in a structured, fair, and timely manner

 

Escalations & Quality Oversight

Act as the first escalation point for the service desk
Personally handle higher‑impact or more complex issues when required
Review work quality and reinforce standards through coaching and example
Identify recurring problems and work with leadership to improve processes

 

Process, Systems & Documentation

Ensure service desk systems are used consistently and correctly
Reinforce disciplined ticket handling, documentation, and time tracking
Contribute to improving procedures, checklists, and knowledge articles
Support reporting on service performance and operational trends

 

Working Schedule

This role includes regular overlap with North American business hours.
Typical working hours are afternoon to evening Egypt time, allowing effective coordination with Canada‑based operations and escalations.

 

Compensation & Benefits

Competitive management‑level compensation package
Compensation reflects responsibility, experience, and Canada‑aligned working hours
Performance reviews and growth opportunities based on results

 

Experience & Qualifications

5+ years experience working in a structured managed services environment using PSA and monitoring tools (experience with tools such as Autotask and Datto RMM is beneficial)
2+ years experience leading, supervising, or mentoring others (Team Lead, Supervisor, or Senior role)
Strong written and spoken English
Comfortable setting priorities, making decisions, and enforcing standards
Able to remain calm, professional, and organized in a client‑facing environment
Experience working with defined processes, service levels, and escalation paths

 

Education

Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or a related field preferred, or equivalent professional experience in a managed services or service desk environment.

 

Preferred Certifications

ITIL Foundation or equivalent practical service management experience
Relevant Microsoft certifications (current or past) are an asset

 

Personal Qualities That Matter

Organized and dependable
Confident, respectful leadership style
Comfortable being accountable for outcomes
Clear communicator who avoids ambiguity
Focused on building a stable and professional operation

 

Why Join Us

Work within an international delivery model supporting Canadian clients
Play a key role in strengthening and scaling our Egypt delivery center
Clear opportunity to grow into broader service delivery or regional leadership as the business expands

 

How to Apply

Please apply with your CV and a brief note describing:

Your experience leading or supervising a service desk team
The types of environments you’ve worked in (internal IT, managed services, multi‑client, etc.)
Your comfort working an Egypt schedule that overlaps with Canada hours
job_requirements:

2+ years in a leadership, supervisory, or senior role with responsibility for guiding or mentoring others
Proven accountability for service desk outcomes (queue health, SLAs, escalations), not just individual ticket resolution

Strong written and spoken English, with the ability to communicate clearly with international stakeholders
Comfortable working an Egypt schedule with regular overlap with North American business hours
Able to make decisions, set priorities, and enforce standards in a professional and respectful manner

skills: Data Analytics | WFM | METRICS | Microsoft Excel | Real Time Management (RTM) | Call Center | BPO | Data analytics | Wfm | Metrics | Microsoft excel | Real time management (rtm) | Call center | Bpo | Real-time monitoring | Workforce optimization | Performance reporting | Scheduling | Forecasting
job_description:
Are you a master of real-time agility, passionate about optimizing performance and driving efficiency in a dynamic call center environment? If so, we have an incredible opportunity for you to join our team as a Real-Time Analyst (RTA) - Workforce Management (WFM)! Based in vibrant Cairo, Egypt, this on-site role offers a chance to make a significant impact on our customer service operations.

As an RTA - WFM, you will be the crucial link between forecasted plans and actual performance, ensuring we have the right people in the right place at the right time. You will be responsible for monitoring real-time performance, identifying trends, and making proactive adjustments to optimize staffing levels and maximize service delivery. This role demands a keen eye for detail, strong analytical skills, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities:

Monitor real-time call center performance against key performance indicators (KPIs) such as service level, abandon rate, and average handle time.
Analyze real-time trends and patterns to identify opportunities for improvement.
Make real-time adjustments to staffing levels to optimize service delivery and minimize wait times.
Communicate effectively with stakeholders to provide updates on performance and recommendations for improvement.
Generate reports and dashboards to track performance and identify areas for optimization.
Utilize Data Analytics and METRICS to inform decision-making.
Leverage Microsoft Excel to manipulate and analyze data.
Apply Real Time Management (RTM) techniques to optimize workforce performance.

Growth Opportunities:

We are committed to investing in our employees' growth and development. As an RTA - WFM, you will have the opportunity to expand your skills in workforce management, data analysis, and leadership. We offer ongoing training and mentorship programs to help you reach your full potential. Advance your career within our BPO organization!

Team & Culture:

Join a supportive and collaborative team of professionals who are passionate about delivering exceptional customer service. We foster a culture of innovation, continuous improvement, and teamwork. We believe in recognizing and rewarding hard work and dedication.

Impact:

Your work will directly impact our ability to provide outstanding customer service and achieve our business goals. You will play a critical role in optimizing our workforce and ensuring that we are always prepared to meet the needs of our customers. Be a driving force in our Call Center operations!

Values:

IntouchCX provides equal employment opportunities in accordance with Egyptian labor laws and regulations.
IntouchCX is committed to ensuring fairness and equality in all aspects of employment and does not discriminate based on gender, origin, language, religion, creed, or disability.
IntouchCX is committed to accommodating individuals with disabilities in compliance with Egyptian labor laws and international best practices.
If you require any accommodations during the application process or need more information about our accommodation policies, please contact us.
By applying to IntouchCX, the applicant consents to IntouchCX collecting, using, and retaining their personal information for purposes related to the application process and, if hired, the employment relationship.
All personal information collected will be handled with strict confidentiality and in accordance with applicable Egyptian privacy and data protection regulations.

Job Description:
We are a UK-based healthcare group running specialized clinics for Travel Health, Blood Testing, and Weight Loss. We are looking for a highly skilled WordPress Developer to take our digital presence to the next level.
Initially, you will focus on optimizing our existing Elementor-based website to increase conversion rates for clinic bookings. Following this, you will lead the development of our WooCommerce store, ensuring it is perfectly synced with our Square POS and local delivery partners (Stuart/Royal Mail).
Key Responsibilities:
Conversion Optimization: Audit and update our current Elementor theme to improve the user journey for clinic bookings (Travel, Blood Tests, Weight Loss).
E-Commerce Development: Build out a robust WooCommerce shop for medical and suncare products.
POS & Inventory Integration: Implement and maintain a real-time, bidirectional sync between Square POS and WooCommerce (stock, pricing, and orders).
Logistics Automation: Integrate delivery APIs (Stuart for same-day London and Royal Mail Click & Drop) to automate label generation and courier dispatch.
Compliance Logic: Develop conditional checkout forms/questionnaires for "Pharmacy-Only" products to ensure medical safety compliance.
Performance: Optimize site speed and Core Web Vitals to handle high-traffic peaks during seasonal suncare/travel surges.
job_requirements:
Expertise in Elementor Pro: Ability to customize themes and build high-converting landing pages without bloated code.
Deep WooCommerce Knowledge: Experience with advanced shipping zones, hooks, and filters.
API Mastery: Proven experience integrating Square Connect API and logistics APIs (Stuart/Deliveroo/Gophr style).
Full-Stack Skills: Proficiency in PHP (essential for Square sync), JavaScript/jQuery, HTML5, and CSS3.
Database Management: Experience managing high-frequency stock updates and preventing "sync conflicts."
Communication: Fluent written and spoken English is required to discuss technical requirements with the UK management team.

Job Purpose:
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated SAP MM Functional Consultant to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for the design, configuration, enhancement, and support of our SAP MM module. You will play a key role in streamlining our Procure-to-Pay (P2P) lifecycle, improving inventory accuracy, reducing costs, and ensuring seamless integration with our finance, production, and sales operations.
Key Responsibilities:
Configuration & Implementation:
Configure, customize, and test the SAP MM module based on business requirements, including Master Data, Purchasing, Inventory Management, Logistics Invoice Verification, and Material Requirements Planning.
Project Leadership: 
Lead and participate in all projects from blueprinting and realization to final preparation, go-live, and post-implementation support.
Business Support:
Serve as the primary functional expert for the MM module, providing timely support, troubleshooting issues, and resolving tickets related to procurement and inventory.
Process Improvement:
Analyze current business processes, identify gaps, and design and implement effective SAP solutions to enhance efficiency, control, and visibility across the supply chain.
Integration Management:
Ensure seamless integration of the MM module with FI, CO, SD, PP, and QM. Deep understanding of account determination and document posting flows is essential.
Documentation & Training:
Create and maintain detailed functional specifications, configuration documents, test scripts, and user training materials. Conduct training sessions for end-users.

About SOFTPRIMES:

SOFTPRIMES is a specialized Odoo consultancy dedicated to delivering comprehensive ERP solutions. We empower businesses through expert implementation, customization, and support of Odoo systems. Our team of certified consultants and developers works collaboratively to transform business processes and drive operational excellence.

Position Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Odoo Techno-Functional Consultant & Team Lead to join our growing organization.
This strategic role combines deep technical and functional expertise in Odoo ERP with leadership, project management, and business development responsibilities.
You will lead our implementation team, manage complex projects, analyze client requirements, and drive new business opportunities while ensuring successful delivery of Odoo solutions.

Key Responsibilities:

Leadership & Team Management

Lead, mentor, and develop a team of Odoo Implementers and Developers, fostering a culture of continuous learning and excellence.
Conduct performance evaluations, provide constructive feedback, and identify training needs for team members.
Allocate resources effectively across multiple projects, balancing workload and skill requirements.
Establish and maintain team standards, best practices, and quality assurance processes for Odoo implementations.

Project Management

Oversee end-to-end project delivery for Odoo implementations, ensuring adherence to timelines, budgets, and quality standards.
Define project scope, objectives, and deliverables in collaboration with clients and stakeholders.
Develop comprehensive project plans, including task breakdown, resource allocation, risk assessment, and mitigation strategies.
Monitor project progress, identify potential roadblocks, and implement corrective actions to ensure successful delivery.
Facilitate effective communication between technical teams, clients, and management stakeholders.

Business Analysis & Requirements Gathering

Conduct comprehensive business process analysis to understand client operations, pain points, and improvement opportunities.
Gather, document, and validate functional and technical requirements through workshops, interviews, and stakeholder consultations.
Translate business requirements into detailed functional specifications and technical design documents.
Design tailored Odoo solutions that optimize business processes and deliver measurable value to clients.
Create process flow diagrams, use cases, and system architecture documentation to guide implementation teams.

Technical & Functional Expertise

Provide expert-level guidance on Odoo modules configuration, customization, and best practices across all functional areas (Sales, CRM, Inventory, Manufacturing, Accounting, Employees, Payroll, etc.).
Design and oversee complex system integrations between Odoo and third-party applications, APIs, and legacy systems.
Review and approve custom module development, ensuring code quality, scalability, and adherence to Odoo development standards.
Conduct system architecture reviews and recommend optimization strategies for performance and efficiency.
Stay current with Odoo version releases, new features, and industry trends to provide informed recommendations to clients and team.

Client Relationship Management

Serve as the primary point of contact for key client accounts, building and maintaining strong, trust-based relationships.
Present solutions, project updates, and strategic recommendations to C-level executives and senior management.
Manage client expectations, address concerns promptly, and ensure high levels of customer satisfaction throughout project lifecycle.
Identify opportunities for account growth, additional services, and solution enhancements within existing client base.

Quality Assurance & Knowledge Management

Establish and enforce quality standards for deliverables, including configuration documentation, customizations, testing protocols, and user training materials.
Conduct regular project reviews and post-implementation assessments to identify lessons learned and areas for improvement.
Build and maintain a centralized knowledge repository of solutions, templates, and best practices for team reference.
Facilitate knowledge transfer sessions and technical workshops to elevate team capabilities and share expertise.

Education

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or related field.

Experience

Minimum 5-7 years of hands-on experience with Odoo ERP implementation, including at least 10 complete end-to-end software projects.
At least 3 years of team leadership or management experience, leading technical teams of 4+ members.
Experience across multiple industries (manufacturing, distribution, retail, services) is highly desirable.

Technical Skills

Expert-level knowledge of Odoo ERP modules: Sales, CRM, Purchase, Inventory, Manufacturing, Accounting, Employees, Payroll, Project Management, and Website.
Strong understanding of Odoo technical architecture, including ORM, views, workflows, and security models.
Solid understanding in Python for Odoo customization and module development.
Familiarity with API integrations, REST/SOAP web services, and middleware solutions.
Hands-on Knowledge of server administration, Odoo SH, deployment processes, and version control (Git).

Professional Competencies

Leadership and team management capabilities with ability to inspire and motivate diverse technical teams.
Outstanding communication and presentation skills in English and Arabic.
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with strategic thinking mindset.
Proven ability to manage multiple priorities, projects, and stakeholders simultaneously.
Client-focused approach with excellent relationship-building and negotiation skills.

Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.
Adaptability and resilience in fast-paced, dynamic environments.

job_description:
About Us & The Role: We’re an ambitious IT System Integrator startup on a mission to secure and connect businesses across Egypt from growing SMBs and hospitals to fast-paced FinTechs. We aren't just looking to fill a seat; we're looking for a core pillar of our business.

We need a Senior IT Sales Manager who thrives on the thrill of the hunt. If you know your way around Network Infrastructure and Cybersecurity, and want the autonomy to build and lead a winning sales team from the ground up, we should definitely talk.

 

What You’ll Actually Be Doing:

Be Our Frontline Hunter: You won't just be managing existing accounts. You'll be out there identifying opportunities, opening new channels, and bringing in fresh B2B clients.
Build Your Squad: Step into a true leadership role. You’ll manage, mentor, and inspire our internal sales team, setting the pace and guiding them to hit their targets.
Sell Solutions, Not Just Boxes: Sit down with clients, dive into their technical headaches, and pitch the right Network Infrastructure (like firewalls, routing, and access points) and Cybersecurity setups that actually solve their problems.
Own the Cycle: Manage everything from that first proactive outreach to closing the deal and maintaining a great relationship afterward.
Shape Our Future: You won’t be taking orders from afar. You’ll sit directly with the founders to brainstorm our market strategy and decide exactly how we position ourselves in the market.

 

Who You Are:

You’ve Done This Before: You have a proven track record of closing B2B deals in Egypt's System Integration (SI) space, ideally at a senior or managerial level.
You Speak the Language: You confidently understand Network Infrastructure and Cybersecurity solutions, and you know how to translate tech features into business value.
You’re Relentlessly Driven: You have strong networking and negotiation skills, and a persistent drive to win new business. To you, a "no" is just a puzzle to solve.
You’re a Natural Leader: You have the experience (or a very strong readiness) to build, manage, and motivate a high-performing sales team.

 

Why You Should Join Us:

Your Earning Potential is in Your Hands: We offer a solid base, but the real reward is in our flexible, uncapped commission structure. You hunt, you close, you earn. Simple.
A Seat at the Table: You aren't joining a rigid corporate machine. You're coming in early to help build the foundation and grow into executive leadership.
True Flexibility: We care about the revenue you bring in and the team you build, not micro-managing your day. Enjoy a hybrid work model built entirely on trust and results.

You will take ownership of core application modules, improve responsiveness and stability, and work closely with stakeholders to deliver reliable features end-to-end—from UI to database. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving complex problems, tuning performance, and writing clean, maintainable code

 

Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain Windows desktop applications using C# and .NET (WinForms).

Build and enhance features end-to-end (UI, business logic, database integration).

Optimize performance (startup time, UI responsiveness, memory usage, CPU utilization).

Implement robust data access and business logic with clean architecture and separation of concerns.

Design and maintain database schemas, tables, indexes, and queries for performance and scalability.

Write clean, testable, maintainable code and produce clear technical documentation.

Troubleshoot production issues, identify root causes, and deliver timely fixes.

Collaborate with product/operations teams to refine requirements and deliver solutions.

Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering standards and best practices.

Use Git-based workflows and support release cycles.

Debugging and profiling tools (Visual Studio diagnostics, profilers)

We are seeking a skilled IT solutions Architect with expertise in virtualisation, network design, and cloud systems. 

 

The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and maintaining our IT infrastructure, ensuring network security, and implementing cloud solutions to support our business operations.

region).
